posts.title: Cedars-Sinai Medical Center – Los Angeles
posts.content:
Cedars-Sinai Medical Center is one of the most prominent academic medical centers in the United States, consistently ranked among the best hospitals in the nation by U.S. News & World Report. Located in Los Angeles, Cedars-Sinai offers comprehensive inpatient and outpatient care across virtually all medical and surgical specialties.

Services include cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, obstetrics, transplant surgery, and emergency medicine. The center is home to world-renowned research institutes and clinical trials programs. Available 24/7 with over 2,000 physicians on staff.
posts.address: 8700 Beverly Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90048, USA

posts.title: UCLA Medical Center – Ronald Reagan Campus
posts.content:
Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center is a world-class academic medical center and the flagship hospital of UCLA Health. Consistently ranked as one of the best hospitals in California and the nation, it offers cutting-edge treatments across all major specialties.

Specialties include oncology, neurosurgery, cardiology, transplant medicine, pediatrics, and reproductive endocrinology. The medical center is affiliated with the David Geffen School of Medicine and conducts extensive clinical research and trials.
posts.companyName: UCLA Health – Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center
posts.address: 757 Westwood Plaza, Los Angeles, CA 90095, USA

posts.title: Keck Medical Center of USC
posts.content:
Keck Medical Center of USC is the university medical center of the University of Southern California, comprising Keck Hospital of USC and USC Norris Cancer Hospital. It is one of only two university-based medical centers in the Los Angeles area.

Keck specializes in complex, high-acuity conditions and offers leading programs in transplantation, cancer treatment, neurology, cardiology, and orthopedics. The center is recognized for its pioneering research and commitment to patient-centered care.
posts.address: 1500 San Pablo St, Los Angeles, CA 90033, USA

posts.title: Children's Hospital Los Angeles
posts.content:
Children's Hospital Los Angeles is the leading pediatric hospital in Southern California and one of the top children's hospitals in the nation. CHLA provides compassionate care for children from infancy through young adulthood.

Specialties include pediatric oncology, cardiac surgery, neurology, gastroenterology, neonatology, and organ transplantation. CHLA is affiliated with the Keck School of Medicine of USC and is a major center for pediatric clinical research and innovation.
posts.address: 4650 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90027, USA

posts.title: Kaiser Permanente Los Angeles Medical Center
posts.content:
Kaiser Permanente Los Angeles Medical Center is one of the largest and most comprehensive hospitals in Southern California. It serves Kaiser Permanente members with integrated care that spans prevention, diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up.

Services include emergency medicine, cardiovascular care, oncology, maternity, behavioral health, orthopedic surgery, and robotic surgery. The center is known for its integrated care model that connects primary and specialty care seamlessly.
posts.companyName: Kaiser Permanente – Los Angeles Medical Center
posts.address: 4867 Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90027, USA

posts.title: Providence Saint John's Health Center – Santa Monica
posts.content:
Providence Saint John's Health Center in Santa Monica is one of Southern California's leading acute care hospitals, serving the greater west Los Angeles community for over 100 years. It is part of the Providence health system.

The center offers a full range of services including the John Wayne Cancer Institute, the Pacific Neuroscience Institute, emergency care, cardiac care, maternity services, and orthopedic surgery. Known for expert oncology care and advanced neurological treatments.
posts.address: 2121 Santa Monica Blvd, Santa Monica, CA 90404, USA

posts.title: Good Samaritan Hospital Los Angeles
posts.content:
Good Samaritan Hospital is a full-service, acute care hospital located in downtown Los Angeles. It has served the LA community for over 130 years and is recognized for its expertise in cardiovascular care, orthopedics, and emergency services.

The hospital features advanced cardiac catheterization labs, a certified primary stroke center, comprehensive orthopedic and spine surgery, a level II trauma center, and a range of outpatient services. It is affiliated with the Hospital Corporation of America (HCA).
posts.address: 1225 Wilshire Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90017, USA

posts.title: Hollywood Presbyterian Medical Center
posts.content:
Hollywood Presbyterian Medical Center (HPMC) has served the Hollywood community for over 100 years. It is a full-service community hospital providing compassionate care to a diverse patient population in the heart of Los Angeles.

Services include emergency care, cardiology, orthopedics, obstetrics and maternity, surgical services, and a comprehensive stroke program. HPMC is committed to providing culturally sensitive care and is known for its accessibility and bilingual services.
posts.address: 1300 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90027, USA

posts.title: Marina Del Rey Hospital
posts.content:
Marina Del Rey Hospital is an acute care hospital serving the westside communities of Los Angeles. It is a boutique-style hospital known for its personalized approach to care and state-of-the-art facilities in a comfortable environment.

Specialties include bariatric surgery, orthopedics, general surgery, emergency care, and maternity services. The hospital is particularly recognized for its bariatric (weight loss surgery) program and joint replacement program. Offers private patient rooms and concierge-level service.
posts.address: 4650 Lincoln Blvd, Mindanao Wy Entrance, Marina Del Rey, CA 90292, USA

posts.title: Huntington Hospital – Pasadena
posts.content:
Huntington Hospital is a leading not-for-profit community hospital located in Pasadena, serving the San Gabriel Valley and greater Los Angeles area. It is one of the largest community hospitals in Southern California with 619 licensed beds.

Services include cancer care, cardiac and vascular surgery, orthopedics, maternity, neuroscience, and emergency medicine. Huntington is consistently recognized for quality and patient safety, holding numerous accreditations and certifications for excellence in care.
posts.address: 100 W California Blvd, Pasadena, CA 91105, USA

posts.title: Torrance Memorial Medical Center
posts.content:
Torrance Memorial Medical Center is a nationally recognized nonprofit community hospital serving the South Bay area of Los Angeles. With over 500 beds, it is one of the most respected hospitals in Southern California.

Specialties include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedic and spine surgery, women's health, emergency services, and behavioral health. Torrance Memorial is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in California and holds Magnet designation for nursing excellence.
posts.address: 3330 Lomita Blvd, Torrance, CA 90505, USA

posts.title: Cedars-Sinai Kerlan-Jobe Institute – Sports Medicine
posts.content:
The Cedars-Sinai Kerlan-Jobe Institute is one of the most prestigious sports medicine and orthopedic surgery practices in the world. Based in Los Angeles, it has served as the official medical provider for numerous professional sports teams including the LA Dodgers, LA Rams, LA Kings, and LA Galaxy.

Services include orthopedic surgery, arthroscopy, sports medicine, physical therapy, and injury prevention programs. The institute is renowned for treating elite athletes and offers the same world-class orthopedic care to all patients.
posts.address: 6801 Park Terrace, Los Angeles, CA 90045, USA

posts.title: Cedars-Sinai Guerin Children's – Pediatric Specialty Care
posts.content:
Cedars-Sinai Guerin Children's is dedicated to providing specialized pediatric medical care in a compassionate, family-centered environment. It brings together expert pediatric specialists under one roof at the Cedars-Sinai campus in Los Angeles.

Pediatric specialties include cardiology, endocrinology, gastroenterology, neurology, oncology, pulmonology, and surgery. The team works closely with adult specialists to coordinate seamless transitions of care for young patients with complex conditions.
posts.address: South Tower, 8700 Beverly Blvd #4221, Los Angeles, CA 90048, USA

posts.title: LAC+USC Medical Center
posts.content:
Los Angeles County + USC Medical Center (LAC+USC) is a public teaching hospital and one of the largest hospitals in the United States. It serves as the primary safety-net hospital for Los Angeles County and is affiliated with the Keck School of Medicine of USC.

LAC+USC provides comprehensive medical and surgical care, trauma services (Level I Trauma Center), neonatal intensive care, psychiatric services, and specialty clinics. It is nationally recognized for its burn center, trauma services, and graduate medical education programs.
posts.companyName: Los Angeles County + USC Medical Center
posts.address: 2051 Marengo St, Los Angeles, CA 90033, USA

posts.title: Providence Cedars-Sinai Tarzana Medical Center
posts.content:
Providence Cedars-Sinai Tarzana Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital serving the San Fernando Valley. As part of the Providence and Cedars-Sinai partnership, it combines community care with academic excellence.

Services include emergency medicine, cardiac care, cancer services, maternity and women's health, neuroscience, orthopedics, and robotic-assisted surgery. The medical center is recognized for high-quality stroke care and has earned The Joint Commission's Gold Seal of Approval.
posts.address: 18321 Clark St, Tarzana, CA 91356, USA

posts.title: Adventist Health White Memorial – East LA
posts.content:
Adventist Health White Memorial is a faith-based, not-for-profit hospital located in the Boyle Heights neighborhood of East Los Angeles. It has served the community for over 100 years with a mission of whole-person care.

Services include emergency care, maternity, oncology, cardiac care, orthopedics, and a range of outpatient specialty clinics. The hospital is a major training site for medical residents and is known for its commitment to serving underserved communities in East LA.
posts.address: 1720 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033, USA

posts.title: Tower Oncology – Beverly Hills Cancer Center
posts.content:
Tower Oncology is a leading private oncology and hematology practice in Beverly Hills, offering comprehensive cancer care in an intimate, patient-centered setting. It is one of the most respected cancer treatment centers in Los Angeles.

Services include medical oncology, hematology, immunotherapy, targeted therapy, clinical trials, and supportive care. Tower Oncology is known for its multidisciplinary approach to cancer treatment and its access to the latest FDA-approved therapies and clinical research studies.
posts.address: 9090 Wilshire Blvd Suite 300, Beverly Hills, CA 90211, USA

posts.title: Glendale Memorial Hospital and Health Center
posts.content:
Glendale Memorial Hospital and Health Center is a 334-bed nonprofit community hospital serving Glendale and surrounding communities in the greater Los Angeles area. Part of Dignity Health, it has provided quality care since 1926.

Specialties include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, women's health, emergency medicine, and neuroscience. The hospital is recognized as a Primary Stroke Center and Cardiac Intervention Center, and holds multiple awards for quality and patient safety.
posts.companyName: Glendale Memorial Hospital and Health Center
posts.address: 1420 S Central Ave, Glendale, CA 91204, USA

posts.title: Olympia Medical Center – West Hollywood
posts.content:
Olympia Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital located in the heart of Los Angeles. It offers a comprehensive range of medical and surgical services with a focus on personalized, high-quality care in a modern, comfortable environment.

Services include cardiovascular care, orthopedic surgery, minimally invasive surgery, emergency care, diagnostic imaging, and rehabilitation. Olympia Medical Center is particularly well known for its cardiac program and advanced surgical capabilities.
posts.address: 5900 W Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90036, USA

posts.title: Grossman Burn Centers – Los Angeles
posts.content:
Grossman Burn Centers is one of the nation's leading burn care and reconstructive surgery centers, headquartered in Los Angeles. Founded by renowned plastic and reconstructive surgeon Dr. Peter Grossman, the center has treated thousands of patients with severe burns and complex wounds.

Services include acute burn care, scar revision, reconstructive surgery, skin grafting, laser treatments, and burn rehabilitation. Grossman Burn Centers also provides telburn consultations and outreach programs, and is affiliated with West Hills Hospital and Medical Center.
posts.address: 7325 Medical Center Dr #200, West Hills, CA 91307, USA

posts.title: NewYork-Presbyterian Hospital – Columbia & Cornell
posts.content:
NewYork-Presbyterian Hospital is one of the nation's most comprehensive academic medical centers, affiliated with two Ivy League schools — Columbia University Vagelos College of Physicians and Surgeons and Weill Cornell Medicine. It is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in the United States.

Services span virtually every medical and surgical specialty including cardiovascular, oncology, neuroscience, transplantation, orthopedics, pediatrics, and emergency medicine. NewYork-Presbyterian operates multiple campuses across the greater New York area and serves over 2 million patients annually.
posts.address: 525 E 68th St, New York, NY 10065, USA

posts.title: Mount Sinai Hospital – New York City
posts.content:
The Mount Sinai Hospital is a world-class academic medical center located on the Upper East Side of Manhattan. Affiliated with the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai, it is consistently ranked among America's best hospitals for multiple specialties.

Specialties include cardiology, oncology, gastroenterology, geriatrics, neurology, and orthopedics. Mount Sinai is recognized for pioneering minimally invasive surgical techniques and maintaining one of the most active clinical trial programs in New York.
posts.address: 1 Gustave L. Levy Pl, New York, NY 10029, USA

posts.title: NYU Langone Health – Manhattan
posts.content:
NYU Langone Health is one of the nation's premier academic medical centers, integrating exceptional patient care, research, and education. Located in Manhattan, it is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in New York and the United States.

NYU Langone offers comprehensive care in orthopedics, cardiology, neurology, oncology, rehabilitation, and over 100 other specialties. Its Perlmutter Cancer Center, Hassenfeld Children's Hospital, and advanced robotic surgery program are among its nationally recognized programs.
posts.address: 550 1st Ave, New York, NY 10016, USA

posts.title: Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center
posts.content:
Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center (MSK) is one of the world's premier cancer treatment and research centers. Founded in 1884 and based in New York City, MSK is consistently ranked as one of the top two cancer hospitals in the United States.

MSK offers multidisciplinary care for over 100 types of cancer, including surgery, radiation therapy, chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and precision medicine. Its research enterprise drives innovation in cancer biology, drug development, and clinical trials, giving patients access to the latest treatments.
posts.address: 1275 York Ave, New York, NY 10065, USA

posts.title: Hospital for Special Surgery – New York
posts.content:
Hospital for Special Surgery (HSS) in New York City is the world's leading academic medical center focused on musculoskeletal health. It is ranked #1 in orthopedics in the United States by U.S. News & World Report for multiple consecutive years.

HSS specializes in orthopedic surgery, rheumatology, sports medicine, spine care, pediatric orthopedics, and physical therapy. It serves as the official hospital for several professional sports teams and national sports organizations. HSS performs more orthopedic surgeries annually than any other hospital in the world.
posts.address: 535 E 70th St Main Hospital, New York, NY 10021, USA

posts.title: Weill Cornell Medicine – New York
posts.content:
Weill Cornell Medicine is one of the top medical colleges in the country and the biomedical research unit and medical school of Cornell University. Affiliated with NewYork-Presbyterian Hospital, it provides world-class clinical care combined with groundbreaking research.

Specialties include cardiothoracic surgery, neurology, oncology, reproductive medicine, ophthalmology, and precision medicine. Weill Cornell's physician-scientists translate discoveries from the laboratory directly to patient care through an integrated academic medical model.
posts.address: 1300 York Ave, New York, NY 10065, USA

posts.title: Lenox Hill Hospital – Upper East Side
posts.content:
Lenox Hill Hospital is a 652-bed acute care hospital located on the Upper East Side of Manhattan. Part of Northwell Health, it has served New York City for over 150 years and is known for excellent patient outcomes and community care.

Services include cardiac surgery, neurosurgery, orthopedics, emergency medicine, maternity care, and minimally invasive surgery. Lenox Hill is the official hospital of the New York Knicks and New York Rangers and houses a nationally recognized cardiac surgery program.
posts.address: 100 E 77th St, New York, NY 10075, USA

posts.title: Montefiore Medical Center – Bronx
posts.content:
Montefiore Medical Center is the University Hospital for Albert Einstein College of Medicine and a leading academic medical center serving the Bronx and surrounding communities. It has been consistently recognized as one of New York's top hospitals.

Montefiore specializes in cardiovascular care, cancer treatment, transplantation, behavioral health, and children's medicine. Its Children's Hospital at Montefiore (CHAM) is one of the leading pediatric centers in the region. The center operates an extensive network of community health centers throughout the Bronx.
posts.address: 111 E 210th St, Bronx, NY 10467, USA

posts.title: Brooklyn Methodist Hospital
posts.content:
NewYork-Presbyterian Brooklyn Methodist Hospital is a major community hospital in Brooklyn, affiliated with Weill Cornell Medicine. It provides high-quality acute care services to the diverse communities of Brooklyn and the surrounding boroughs.

Services include cardiac care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, maternity, and emergency medicine. The hospital has earned numerous recognitions for patient safety and quality, including Leapfrog Hospital Safety Grade A and multiple specialty certifications.
posts.address: 506 6th St, Brooklyn, NY 11215, USA

posts.title: Staten Island University Hospital
posts.content:
Staten Island University Hospital (SIUH) is the largest healthcare provider on Staten Island and a major teaching hospital affiliated with the Zucker School of Medicine at Hofstra/Northwell. It operates two campuses serving the entire Staten Island community.

SIUH offers comprehensive services in cardiac care, oncology, orthopedics, bariatrics, neuroscience, and maternity. It is home to one of the busiest emergency departments in New York City and runs extensive outpatient specialty practices across the island.
posts.companyName: Staten Island University Hospital – Northwell Health
posts.address: 475 Seaview Ave, Staten Island, NY 10305, USA

posts.title: Columbia University Irving Medical Center
posts.content:
Columbia University Irving Medical Center (CUIMC) is one of the world's leading academic health science centers and the medical campus of Columbia University, located in Washington Heights, Manhattan. It encompasses four professional schools and a major hospital.

Research and clinical programs span oncology, neuroscience, cardiovascular medicine, organ transplantation, women's health, and global health. CUIMC is home to numerous NIH-funded research centers and translates cutting-edge science into innovative treatments for patients.
posts.address: 622 W 168th St, New York, NY 10032, USA

posts.title: NYU Grossman School of Medicine – Bellevue
posts.content:
Bellevue Hospital Center is the oldest public hospital in the United States, founded in 1736, and the flagship of the NYC Health + Hospitals system. It serves as a major academic and safety-net hospital affiliated with NYU Grossman School of Medicine.

Bellevue is home to a Level I Trauma Center, a nationally recognized psychiatric emergency program, comprehensive HIV/AIDS services, and specialty care for tuberculosis and correctional health. It is celebrated for its commitment to caring for all New Yorkers regardless of ability to pay.
posts.address: 462 1st Ave, New York, NY 10016, USA

posts.title: North Shore University Hospital – Manhasset
posts.content:
North Shore University Hospital is a 775-bed teaching hospital and the flagship of Northwell Health, located in Manhasset on Long Island. It is one of the most recognized hospitals in the greater New York metropolitan area.

North Shore is particularly known for its cardiovascular program, cancer center, neurosurgery, organ transplantation, and emergency medicine. It serves as the official hospital for the New York Giants and New York Jets NFL teams and is affiliated with the Zucker School of Medicine at Hofstra/Northwell.
posts.companyName: North Shore University Hospital – Northwell Health
posts.address: 300 Community Dr, Manhasset, NY 11030, USA

posts.title: Sloane Hospital for Women – NYC
posts.content:
Sloane Hospital for Women at Columbia University Medical Center is one of the nation's leading centers for obstetrics and gynecology, located within NewYork-Presbyterian Hospital. It has a long tradition of excellence in women's health care and medical education.

Services include high-risk pregnancy management, minimally invasive gynecologic surgery, gynecologic oncology, reproductive endocrinology and infertility, urogynecology, and maternal-fetal medicine. Sloane's neonatal intensive care unit (NICU) is among the best in the country.
posts.companyName: Sloane Hospital for Women at Columbia University
posts.address: 622 W 168th St ph 1291, New York, NY 10032, USA

posts.title: Elmhurst Hospital Center – Queens
posts.content:
Elmhurst Hospital Center is a major public hospital and level I trauma center in Queens, New York, operated by NYC Health + Hospitals. It is affiliated with the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai and serves one of the most diverse communities in the world.

Elmhurst provides a full range of medical services including emergency care, surgery, psychiatry, pediatrics, obstetrics, and specialty clinics in a multitude of languages. During the COVID-19 pandemic, it gained international recognition for its frontline response.
posts.address: 79-01 Broadway, Elmhurst, NY 11373, USA

posts.title: Northwestern Memorial Hospital – Chicago
posts.content:
Northwestern Memorial Hospital is the primary teaching hospital of Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine and one of the top-ranked hospitals in the United States. Located in the Streeterville neighborhood of Chicago, it is consistently ranked #1 in Illinois.

Specialties include cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, obstetrics, transplantation, and digestive disease. Northwestern Memorial is known for its pioneering research, outstanding physician expertise, and commitment to patient-centered, evidence-based care.
posts.address: 251 E Huron St, Chicago, IL 60611, USA

posts.title: Rush University Medical Center – Chicago
posts.content:
Rush University Medical Center is an academic medical center located in the Illinois Medical District of Chicago. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Illinois and the Midwest, and is the clinical enterprise of Rush University.

Rush is particularly renowned for its orthopedics program, neurology, rheumatology, oncology, and cardiology. The hospital has earned numerous recognitions for quality and patient safety, including Magnet designation for nursing excellence.
posts.address: 1620 W Harrison St, Chicago, IL 60612, USA

posts.title: University of Chicago Medical Center
posts.content:
UChicago Medicine is one of the nation's leading academic medical centers, integrating the research of the University of Chicago with exemplary patient care. Located in the Hyde Park neighborhood, it is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Illinois.

Specialties include cancer care (through the Comprehensive Cancer Center), transplantation, cardiovascular care, gastroenterology, and neuroscience. UChicago Medicine is particularly recognized for its precision medicine programs and participation in cutting-edge clinical trials.
posts.address: 5841 S Maryland Ave, Chicago, IL 60637, USA

posts.title: Advocate Christ Medical Center – Oak Lawn
posts.content:
Advocate Christ Medical Center is one of the largest hospitals in Illinois and a major teaching hospital in the Chicago southwest suburbs. It is the flagship hospital of Advocate Health Care and provides comprehensive care across dozens of specialties.

Services include Level I trauma care, cardiovascular surgery, oncology, neurosurgery, women's health, pediatrics (through Hope Children's Hospital), and organ transplantation. Advocate Christ is recognized for clinical excellence and has earned numerous national quality awards.
posts.address: 4440 W 95th St, Oak Lawn, IL 60453, USA

posts.title: Loyola University Medical Center – Maywood
posts.content:
Loyola University Medical Center is a nationally recognized academic medical center affiliated with Loyola University Chicago. Located in Maywood, it is one of the leading hospitals in the Chicago metropolitan area for complex and specialized care.

Loyola is ranked among the best hospitals in Illinois for cardiology, cancer, orthopedics, and neurology. It is also home to one of the busiest Level I trauma centers in Illinois and a comprehensive transplant program.
posts.companyName: Loyola Medicine – Loyola University Medical Center
posts.address: 2160 S 1st Ave, Maywood, IL 60153, USA

posts.title: Shirley Ryan AbilityLab – Chicago
posts.content:
Shirley Ryan AbilityLab (formerly the Rehabilitation Institute of Chicago) is the #1 ranked rehabilitation hospital in the United States — a distinction it has held for over 30 consecutive years. Located in Chicago's Streeterville neighborhood, it is a global leader in physical medicine and rehabilitation.

Programs include stroke rehabilitation, spinal cord injury, traumatic brain injury, amputee care, pediatric rehabilitation, and sports medicine. The AbilityLab integrates clinical care with translational research to accelerate recovery and transform rehabilitation science.
posts.address: 355 E Erie St, Chicago, IL 60611, USA

posts.title: Ann & Robert H. Lurie Children's Hospital of Chicago
posts.content:
Ann & Robert H. Lurie Children's Hospital of Chicago is the premier pediatric hospital in Illinois and one of the top children's hospitals in the nation. Affiliated with Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine, it provides exceptional care for children from birth through young adulthood.

Pediatric specialties include cardiology, cancer, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and rare disease programs. Lurie Children's is recognized for its compassionate, family-centered approach and groundbreaking pediatric research.
posts.address: 225 E Chicago Ave, Chicago, IL 60611, USA

posts.title: Illinois Bone & Joint Institute – Chicago
posts.content:
Illinois Bone & Joint Institute (IBJI) is the largest physician-owned orthopedic practice in Illinois and one of the leading orthopedic groups in the nation. With over 100 physicians and multiple locations throughout the Chicago metropolitan area, IBJI delivers comprehensive musculoskeletal care.

Services include joint replacement, sports medicine, spine surgery, hand and upper extremity surgery, foot and ankle care, and physical therapy. IBJI is known for its subspecialty expertise, advanced surgical techniques, and outstanding outcomes.
posts.address: 900 Rand Rd Suite 200, Des Plaines, IL 60016, USA

posts.title: Swedish Hospital – Chicago
posts.content:
Swedish Hospital is a community hospital serving the north side of Chicago for over 100 years. As part of NorthShore University HealthSystem, it provides high-quality medical and surgical care with a strong focus on community health.

Services include cardiac care, orthopedics, cancer treatment, maternity and women's health, emergency medicine, and minimally invasive surgery. Swedish Hospital is known for its high patient satisfaction scores and its deep roots in the diverse north side neighborhoods of Chicago.
posts.address: 5140 N California Ave, Chicago, IL 60625, USA

posts.title: Stroger Hospital of Cook County
posts.content:
John H. Stroger Jr. Hospital of Cook County is a major public hospital and Level I Trauma Center in Chicago, serving as a safety-net hospital for the residents of Cook County. It is one of the busiest trauma centers in the Midwest.

Stroger Hospital offers comprehensive inpatient and outpatient services including emergency medicine, surgery, internal medicine, psychiatry, obstetrics, and a large network of specialty clinics. It is affiliated with Rush Medical College and serves as a major training site for physicians and residents.
posts.companyName: John H. Stroger Jr. Hospital of Cook County
posts.address: 1969 W Ogden Ave, Chicago, IL 60612, USA

posts.title: Texas Medical Center – Houston
posts.content:
The Texas Medical Center (TMC) in Houston is the world's largest medical complex, home to more than 60 institutions including internationally acclaimed hospitals, research institutions, and schools of health sciences. It treats over 10 million patients annually.

TMC institutions collectively offer every medical specialty and subspecialty, and conduct more research than any other medical center in the world. Major member institutions include MD Anderson Cancer Center, Houston Methodist Hospital, and UTHealth Houston.
posts.address: Executive Offices, 6550 Bertner Ave, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: MD Anderson Cancer Center – Houston
posts.content:
MD Anderson Cancer Center is one of the world's most respected centers devoted exclusively to cancer patient care, research, education, and prevention. Consistently ranked #1 or #2 in cancer care in the United States by U.S. News & World Report, it is located in the Texas Medical Center in Houston.

MD Anderson treats patients with every type of cancer and offers access to hundreds of clinical trials. Its Moon Shots Program™ accelerates the development of cures for the most deadly cancers. Patients come from across the U.S. and over 130 countries every year.
posts.companyName: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center
posts.address: 1515 Holcombe Blvd, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Houston Methodist Hospital
posts.content:
Houston Methodist Hospital is the flagship hospital of Houston Methodist, an internationally recognized academic medical center. It is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in Texas and the United States, and is known for its culture of excellence and innovation.

Specialties include cardiovascular surgery, organ transplantation, oncology, orthopedics, neurosurgery, and robotic surgery. Houston Methodist has a long tradition of firsts in medicine, including performing the first successful heart transplant in Texas.
posts.address: 6565 Fannin St, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Memorial Hermann – Texas Medical Center
posts.content:
Memorial Hermann Hospital in the Texas Medical Center is the flagship hospital of Memorial Hermann Health System, one of the largest not-for-profit health systems in Texas. It serves as a leading academic and trauma center in the Houston region.

Memorial Hermann TMC is home to a Level I Trauma Center, a comprehensive stroke center, cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, and the Mischer Neuroscience Institute. It is affiliated with McGovern Medical School at UTHealth Houston.
posts.companyName: Memorial Hermann Hospital – Texas Medical Center
posts.address: 6411 Fannin St, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Baylor St. Luke's Medical Center – Houston
posts.content:
Baylor St. Luke's Medical Center is a nationally recognized academic medical center in Houston, part of CommonSpirit Health. It is the clinical home of the Texas Heart Institute, which pioneered the use of mechanical circulatory support and heart transplantation.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, transplantation, oncology, neurosurgery, and complex surgical care. The Texas Heart Institute at Baylor St. Luke's has performed more heart transplants than virtually any other institution in the world.
posts.address: 1101 Bates Ave, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Texas Children's Hospital – Houston
posts.content:
Texas Children's Hospital in Houston is the largest children's hospital in the United States and consistently ranked as one of the best pediatric hospitals in the nation. It is affiliated with Baylor College of Medicine and provides expert care for children from birth through age 17.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neonatology, neurology, orthopedics, and infectious disease. Texas Children's Cancer and Hematology Centers are nationally recognized for their expertise in treating childhood cancers.
posts.address: 6621 Fannin St, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Ben Taub Hospital – Houston
posts.content:
Ben Taub Hospital is a major public hospital and Level I Trauma Center in Houston, operated by Harris Health System. It serves as a critical safety-net hospital for Harris County and is affiliated with Baylor College of Medicine.

Ben Taub provides comprehensive emergency care, trauma services, surgery, internal medicine, psychiatry, and over 80 specialty clinics. It is one of the busiest trauma centers in Texas and plays a vital role in the medical education of the next generation of physicians.
posts.companyName: Ben Taub Hospital – Harris Health System
posts.address: 1504 Ben Taub Loop, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: CHI St. Luke's Health – The Woodlands
posts.content:
CHI St. Luke's Health – The Woodlands Hospital is a full-service acute care hospital serving the rapidly growing communities of The Woodlands and north Houston suburbs. Part of CommonSpirit Health, it provides high-quality care close to home.

Services include emergency medicine, cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, and maternity. The Woodlands Hospital is known for its modern facilities, highly skilled physicians, and commitment to patient experience and community wellness.
posts.companyName: CHI St. Luke's Health – The Woodlands Hospital
posts.address: 17200 St Lukes Way, The Woodlands, TX 77384, USA

posts.title: UTHealth Houston – McGovern Medical School Clinics
posts.content:
UT Physicians is the clinical practice of McGovern Medical School at UTHealth Houston, offering comprehensive specialty and primary care services across the Houston metropolitan area. With over 2,000 clinicians, it is one of the largest physician groups in Texas.

Specialty care encompasses cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, ophthalmology, dermatology, psychiatry, and many more. UT Physicians is at the forefront of translational research and delivers innovative therapies developed at UTHealth directly to patients.
posts.address: 6410 Fannin St entrance, 77030 Main St #200, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Houston VA Medical Center
posts.content:
The Michael E. DeBakey VA Medical Center in Houston is one of the most complex VA medical centers in the country, providing comprehensive healthcare services to veterans in southeast Texas. It is a major academic medical center affiliated with Baylor College of Medicine.

Services include primary care, mental health, surgery, cardiology, oncology, spinal cord injury, blind rehabilitation, and polytrauma care. The center is named after the legendary cardiac surgeon Dr. Michael E. DeBakey, who pioneered numerous advances in cardiovascular surgery.
posts.companyName: Michael E. DeBakey VA Medical Center
posts.address: 2002 Holcombe Blvd, Houston, TX 77030, USA

posts.title: Jackson Memorial Hospital – Miami
posts.content:
Jackson Memorial Hospital is the flagship of Jackson Health System and the primary teaching hospital of the University of Miami Miller School of Medicine. It is one of the largest hospitals in the United States and a major quaternary care center for South Florida and Latin America.

Jackson Memorial is home to a Level I Trauma Center, a comprehensive burn center, organ transplant programs, and extensive specialty care in cardiology, oncology, neurosurgery, and pediatrics (through Holtz Children's Hospital). It serves as a lifeline for patients from across the Americas.
posts.address: 1611 NW 12th Ave, Miami, FL 33136, USA

posts.title: University of Miami Health System – UHealth
posts.content:
UHealth – University of Miami Health System is South Florida's only university-based health system, delivering leading-edge patient care, research, and education through the Miller School of Medicine. It operates multiple hospitals and clinics throughout Miami-Dade and Broward counties.

UHealth specialties include oncology, cardiology, neurology, ophthalmology, orthopedics, and transplantation. Sylvester Comprehensive Cancer Center, part of UHealth, is the only NCI-designated cancer center in South Florida.
posts.address: 1400 NW 12th Ave, Miami, FL 33136, USA

posts.title: Cleveland Clinic Florida – Weston
posts.content:
Cleveland Clinic Florida is a not-for-profit, multispecialty academic medical center that provides the same world-class care as its legendary Cleveland, Ohio counterpart. Located in Weston, it serves patients from South Florida and around the world.

Specialties include cardiovascular medicine, oncology, neurology, urology, orthopedics, and digestive disease. Cleveland Clinic Florida is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Florida and is recognized globally for clinical excellence and innovation.
posts.address: 3100 Weston Rd, Weston, FL 33331, USA

posts.title: Baptist Health South Florida – Miami
posts.content:
Baptist Health South Florida is the region's largest not-for-profit healthcare organization, operating multiple hospitals, urgent care centers, and outpatient facilities across Miami-Dade, Broward, Monroe, and Palm Beach counties.

Baptist Health is renowned for its cardiac and vascular institute, cancer care through Miami Cancer Institute, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. It is consistently ranked as the #1 hospital in Miami and one of the best in Florida by U.S. News & World Report.
posts.address: 8900 N Kendall Dr, Miami, FL 33176, USA

posts.title: Nicklaus Children's Hospital – Miami
posts.content:
Nicklaus Children's Hospital (formerly Miami Children's Hospital) is the largest children's hospital in South Florida and one of the top pediatric hospitals in the nation. It provides specialized care for children from birth through age 18 across all medical and surgical specialties.

Renowned programs include pediatric cardiac surgery, neurology, oncology, orthopedics, neonatology, and surgery. Nicklaus Children's has the only Level IV Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) in Miami-Dade County and is a leader in pediatric clinical research.
posts.address: 3100 SW 62nd Ave, Miami, FL 33155, USA

posts.title: Mount Sinai Medical Center – Miami Beach
posts.content:
Mount Sinai Medical Center is one of the largest private independent not-for-profit teaching hospitals in South Florida, located on Miami Beach. It has been serving the community for over 60 years and is recognized for high-quality clinical care and advanced medical education.

Services include cardiac care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. Mount Sinai Miami Beach offers a broad range of outpatient specialty clinics and is affiliated with the University of Miami Miller School of Medicine.
posts.companyName: Mount Sinai Medical Center Miami Beach
posts.address: 4300 Alton Rd, Miami Beach, FL 33140, USA

posts.title: Memorial Regional Hospital – Hollywood, FL
posts.content:
Memorial Regional Hospital is the flagship hospital of Memorial Healthcare System, one of the largest public health systems in the United States. Located in Hollywood, Florida, it serves the Broward County community with comprehensive acute care services.

Services include cardiovascular care, the Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital, Level II trauma care, oncology, orthopedics, and maternity. Memorial Regional is consistently recognized for quality and patient safety and is one of the busiest hospitals in South Florida.
posts.address: 3501 Johnson St, Hollywood, FL 33021, USA

posts.title: Bascom Palmer Eye Institute – Miami
posts.content:
Bascom Palmer Eye Institute at the University of Miami is the #1 ranked ophthalmology program in the United States — a distinction it has held for over two decades. It is the eye institute of the University of Miami Miller School of Medicine.

Bascom Palmer specializes in all aspects of eye care including retinal disease, glaucoma, corneal transplantation, cataract surgery, pediatric ophthalmology, neuro-ophthalmology, and low vision rehabilitation. It serves patients from across the U.S. and internationally, conducting world-leading ophthalmic research.
posts.address: 900 NW 17th St, Miami, FL 33136, USA

posts.title: UT Southwestern Medical Center – Dallas
posts.content:
UT Southwestern Medical Center is one of the nation's premier academic medical centers, home to six Nobel laureates and a worldwide leader in medical research and education. Located in Dallas, it provides exceptional care through its affiliated hospital network.

Clinical programs of excellence include oncology, cardiology, neurology, orthopedics, organ transplantation, and digestive and liver diseases. UT Southwestern's Simmons Comprehensive Cancer Center is the only NCI-designated cancer center in North Texas.
posts.address: 5323 Harry Hines Blvd, Dallas, TX 75390, USA

posts.title: Baylor University Medical Center – Dallas
posts.content:
Baylor University Medical Center at Dallas is one of the largest private hospitals in the United States and the flagship of Baylor Scott & White Health. It is a major academic and referral center serving patients from across Texas and the nation.

Specialties include organ transplantation, cardiac care, oncology, neurosurgery, orthopedics, and gastrointestinal disease. Baylor Dallas is particularly renowned for its Transplant Services, having performed over 9,000 transplants since 1985.
posts.companyName: Baylor University Medical Center at Dallas
posts.address: 3500 Gaston Ave, Dallas, TX 75246, USA

posts.title: Children's Medical Center Dallas
posts.content:
Children's Medical Center Dallas is one of the largest pediatric health care providers in the United States and the pediatric teaching hospital for UT Southwestern Medical Center. It is consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the nation.

Specialties include pediatric cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and transplantation. Children's Health provides care at over 60 specialty care clinics, offering convenient access to expert pediatric care throughout North Texas.
posts.companyName: Children's Health – Children's Medical Center Dallas
posts.address: 1935 Medical District Dr, Dallas, TX 75235, USA

posts.title: Parkland Memorial Hospital – Dallas
posts.content:
Parkland Memorial Hospital is the public teaching hospital for Dallas County and the primary clinical training site for UT Southwestern Medical Center. It is one of the busiest hospitals in Texas and home to a Level I Trauma Center and a renowned burn center.

Parkland provides comprehensive inpatient and outpatient services including emergency medicine, maternal and fetal medicine, surgery, psychiatry, and a wide range of specialty clinics. The Parkland Health System operates an extensive network of community health centers serving uninsured and underinsured patients.
posts.address: 5200 Harry Hines Blvd, Dallas, TX 75235, USA

posts.title: Methodist Dallas Medical Center
posts.content:
Methodist Dallas Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital and the flagship of Methodist Health System, serving the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex since 1927. It is a major teaching hospital with a broad range of inpatient and outpatient services.

Services include cardiovascular care, Level II trauma, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. Methodist Dallas is particularly known for its award-winning cardiac surgery program and its commitment to community health and wellness.
posts.address: 1441 N Beckley Ave, Dallas, TX 75203, USA

posts.title: Texas Health Presbyterian Hospital Dallas
posts.content:
Texas Health Presbyterian Hospital Dallas is one of the largest hospitals in the Dallas-Fort Worth region and part of the Texas Health Resources system. Founded in 1966, it provides comprehensive acute care services across dozens of specialties.

Specialties include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. The hospital is nationally recognized for quality and patient safety, including Magnet nursing designation and multiple specialty accreditations.
posts.address: 8200 Walnut Hill Ln, Dallas, TX 75231, USA

posts.title: Southwestern Medical Clinic – Dallas
posts.content:
Southwestern Medical Clinic is the outpatient clinical practice of UT Southwestern Medical Center, offering world-class specialty and subspecialty care in a convenient outpatient setting across multiple locations in the Dallas metroplex.

Clinic specialties include cardiology, endocrinology, gastroenterology, nephrology, neurology, rheumatology, dermatology, and many more. Patients benefit from access to UT Southwestern's physician-scientists and cutting-edge clinical trials in a community clinic environment.
posts.companyName: Southwestern Medical Clinic at UT Southwestern
posts.address: 1801 Inwood Rd, Dallas, TX 75390, USA

posts.title: Medical City Dallas Hospital
posts.content:
Medical City Dallas Hospital is a nationally recognized 895-bed tertiary care hospital and major referral center in North Texas, part of HCA Healthcare. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Dallas-Fort Worth for multiple specialties.

Specialties include cardiovascular surgery, transplantation, oncology, neurosurgery, orthopedics, and Level III neonatal intensive care. Medical City Dallas is the official hospital of FC Dallas and serves as a major destination for complex cases from across the region.
posts.address: 7777 Forest Ln, Dallas, TX 75230, USA

posts.title: UC San Diego Medical Center – Hillcrest
posts.content:
UC San Diego Medical Center in Hillcrest is the flagship academic medical center of UC San Diego Health and a leading teaching hospital affiliated with the UC San Diego School of Medicine. It provides comprehensive specialty and quaternary care to San Diego County and beyond.

Specialties include organ transplantation, cardiovascular surgery, oncology (Moores Cancer Center), neurosurgery, and complex surgical care. UCSD Hillcrest is home to a Level I Trauma Center and serves as a major referral center for difficult cases throughout Southern California and beyond.
posts.companyName: UC San Diego Health – Hillcrest Medical Center
posts.address: 200 W Arbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92103, USA

posts.title: Scripps Mercy Hospital – San Diego
posts.content:
Scripps Mercy Hospital San Diego is a faith-based not-for-profit hospital serving the greater San Diego community for over 120 years. As part of Scripps Health, it provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services to patients throughout the region.

Scripps Mercy San Diego is home to a Level I Trauma Center — one of only two in the county — as well as comprehensive cardiac care, oncology, neuroscience, orthopedics, and women's health programs. It also operates a respected graduate medical education program.
posts.address: 4077 Fifth Ave, San Diego, CA 92103, USA

posts.title: Sharp Memorial Hospital – San Diego
posts.content:
Sharp Memorial Hospital is one of the San Diego region's foremost acute care hospitals and the flagship of Sharp HealthCare, the region's largest integrated health care system. It is consistently recognized for clinical quality and patient safety.

Sharp Memorial offers comprehensive services including cardiac and vascular care, cancer treatment through Sharp Grossmont and Sharp Chula Vista, neuroscience, orthopedics, and emergency medicine. The hospital features state-of-the-art facilities and a nationally recognized nursing program with Magnet designation.
posts.address: 7901 Frost St, San Diego, CA 92123, USA

posts.title: Rady Children's Hospital – San Diego
posts.content:
Rady Children's Hospital-San Diego is the largest children's hospital in California and the only hospital in the San Diego region dedicated exclusively to pediatric care. Affiliated with UC San Diego School of Medicine, it is consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the nation.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and rare disease programs. Rady Children's treats more than 236,000 children annually and is the pediatric trauma center for San Diego County.
posts.address: 3020 Children's Way, San Diego, CA 92123, USA

posts.title: Scripps Green Hospital – La Jolla
posts.content:
Scripps Green Hospital in La Jolla is a renowned acute care hospital affiliated with The Scripps Research Institute, one of the world's leading biomedical research organizations. It is part of Scripps Health and is known for integrating cutting-edge research with exceptional patient care.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, minimally invasive surgery, and cancer genomics. Scripps Green is consistently recognized for clinical excellence and is a destination hospital for complex cases from throughout the Western United States.
posts.address: 10666 N Torrey Pines Rd, La Jolla, CA 92037, USA

posts.title: Naval Medical Center San Diego
posts.content:
Naval Medical Center San Diego (NMCSD) is the largest military medical center on the West Coast of the United States. Located in Balboa Park, it provides comprehensive medical care for active duty military personnel, retirees, and their families in the San Diego region.

NMCSD offers services across all major specialties including surgery, internal medicine, orthopedics, neurology, psychiatry, and rehabilitation medicine. It also serves as a major medical training institution for Navy and Marine Corps medical officers and corpsmen.
posts.address: 34800 Bob Wilson Dr, San Diego, CA 92134, USA

posts.title: Palomar Medical Center – Escondido
posts.content:
Palomar Medical Center in Escondido is a state-of-the-art hospital serving North San Diego County. It is the flagship facility of Palomar Health, a public health care district, and is recognized as one of the most innovative hospital buildings in the nation.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, emergency medicine, and a comprehensive diabetes management program. Palomar Medical Center has received multiple awards for quality, safety, and patient experience.
posts.address: 2185 Citracado Parkwy, Escondido, CA 92029, USA

posts.title: UC San Diego Moores Cancer Center
posts.content:
UC San Diego Moores Cancer Center is the only NCI-designated Comprehensive Cancer Center in San Diego County and one of just 56 such centers in the nation. It provides leading-edge cancer care integrating the latest research with compassionate clinical treatment.

Services include medical oncology, radiation oncology, surgical oncology, cancer genetics, immunotherapy, and phase I–IV clinical trials. Moores Cancer Center specializes in hematologic malignancies, gastrointestinal cancers, breast cancer, and thoracic oncology, among many others.
posts.companyName: UC San Diego Moores Cancer Center
posts.address: 3855 Health Sciences Dr, San Diego, CA 92037, USA

posts.title: Massachusetts General Hospital – Boston
posts.content:
Massachusetts General Hospital (MGH) is the original and largest teaching hospital of Harvard Medical School and one of the most prestigious hospitals in the world. Founded in 1811, it is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in the United States by U.S. News & World Report.

MGH provides extraordinary care in virtually every medical and surgical specialty, including cancer, cardiovascular disease, neuroscience, transplantation, and pediatrics. Its research enterprise is the largest hospital-based research program in the United States, with over $1 billion in annual funding.
posts.address: 55 Fruit St, Boston, MA 02114, USA

posts.title: Brigham and Women's Hospital – Boston
posts.content:
Brigham and Women's Hospital is a leading academic medical center affiliated with Harvard Medical School and a founding member of Mass General Brigham (formerly Partners HealthCare). It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in the United States across multiple specialties.

Specialties of excellence include cardiovascular medicine, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and transplantation. BWH is one of the nation's largest hospitals and is particularly recognized for its leadership in precision medicine and genome research.
posts.address: 75 Francis St, Boston, MA 02115, USA

posts.title: Boston Children's Hospital
posts.content:
Boston Children's Hospital is the nation's #1 pediatric hospital and the primary pediatric teaching hospital of Harvard Medical School. It has held this ranking for 30 consecutive years in the U.S. News & World Report Best Children's Hospitals rankings.

Boston Children's provides advanced care across all pediatric specialties including cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, and rare diseases. Its research enterprise is the world's largest pediatric research program, generating breakthrough discoveries that improve children's health globally.
posts.address: 300 Longwood Ave, Boston, MA 02115, USA

posts.title: Dana-Farber Cancer Institute – Boston
posts.content:
Dana-Farber Cancer Institute is one of the world's leading cancer research and treatment centers, affiliated with Harvard Medical School and Brigham and Women's Hospital. It is consistently ranked among the top cancer centers in the United States.

Dana-Farber provides comprehensive cancer care for adults (through Dana-Farber/Brigham and Women's Cancer Center) and children (through Dana-Farber/Boston Children's Cancer and Blood Disorders Center). Its research programs have been responsible for numerous landmark cancer treatment advances.
posts.address: 450 Brookline Ave, Boston, MA 02215, USA

posts.title: Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center – Boston
posts.content:
Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center is a nationally recognized academic medical center affiliated with Harvard Medical School, consistently ranked among the best hospitals in the United States. BIDMC is part of Beth Israel Lahey Health.

Clinical strengths include cardiovascular care, cancer, gastroenterology, transplantation, orthopedics, and neurology. BIDMC is known for its culture of innovation and its history of medical breakthroughs, including pioneering work in cardiac surgery and intensive care medicine.
posts.address: 330 Brookline Ave, Boston, MA 02215, USA

posts.title: Boston Medical Center
posts.content:
Boston Medical Center (BMC) is the largest safety-net hospital in New England and the primary teaching hospital of Boston University Chobanian & Avedisian School of Medicine. It provides comprehensive care to all patients, regardless of insurance status.

BMC offers services across all major specialties, with nationally recognized programs in HIV/AIDS care, addiction medicine, social determinants of health, and trauma care. It operates a Level I Trauma Center and is committed to ending health inequities in the Boston community.
posts.address: One Boston Medical Center Pl, Boston, MA 02118, USA

posts.title: Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital – Boston
posts.content:
Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital is New England's largest rehabilitation hospital and one of the top rehabilitation centers in the nation. Affiliated with Harvard Medical School and Mass General Brigham, it is consistently ranked among the best rehabilitation hospitals in the U.S.

Programs include stroke rehabilitation, spinal cord injury, traumatic brain injury, amputee care, and sports rehabilitation. Spaulding is renowned for integrating research with clinical care to advance the science of rehabilitation medicine and optimize patient recovery.
posts.address: 300 1st Ave, Charlestown, MA 02129, USA

posts.title: Tufts Medical Center – Boston
posts.content:
Tufts Medical Center is a nationally recognized academic medical center and the principal teaching hospital of Tufts University School of Medicine. Located in the heart of Boston, it combines expert clinical care with cutting-edge research and a strong tradition of medical training.

Services include cardiology, oncology, neurology, transplantation, psychiatry, and high-risk obstetrics. Tufts Medical Center is also home to The Floating Hospital for Children, providing exceptional pediatric care in the same campus as its adult services.
posts.address: 800 Washington St, Boston, MA 02111, USA

posts.title: UW Medical Center – Seattle
posts.content:
UW Medical Center – Montlake is the flagship hospital of UW Medicine and a major academic medical center affiliated with the University of Washington School of Medicine. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Washington state and the Pacific Northwest.

UW Medical Center offers comprehensive care in virtually all specialties, with particular strengths in organ transplantation, oncology, cardiovascular surgery, neuroscience, and trauma. The medical center is a leader in clinical research and participates in hundreds of clinical trials each year.
posts.address: 1959 NE Pacific St Main Hospital, Seattle, WA 98195, USA

posts.title: Virginia Mason Franciscan Health – Seattle
posts.content:
Virginia Mason Medical Center is an internationally recognized nonprofit health care organization in Seattle, known for applying the Toyota Production System to health care delivery — a model adopted by hospitals worldwide. It is part of Virginia Mason Franciscan Health.

Specialties include digestive disease, orthopedics, oncology, cardiovascular care, neuroscience, and spine care. Virginia Mason is particularly acclaimed for its quality improvement methodology and its commitment to making care safer, more efficient, and more patient-centered.
posts.address: 1100 9th Ave, Seattle, WA 98101, USA

posts.title: Swedish Medical Center – Seattle
posts.content:
Swedish Medical Center is the largest nonprofit health provider in the greater Seattle area, with multiple campuses and specialty centers throughout the Puget Sound region. It is part of Providence Swedish and serves hundreds of thousands of patients annually.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, neuroscience (Swedish Neuroscience Institute), orthopedics, women's health, and comprehensive cancer care. Swedish is particularly recognized for its Level III NICU and its highly ranked programs in cardiac surgery and neurosurgery.
posts.address: 747 Broadway, Seattle, WA 98122, USA

posts.title: Seattle Children's Hospital
posts.content:
Seattle Children's Hospital is one of the top pediatric hospitals in the United States, consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the nation. Affiliated with the University of Washington School of Medicine, it provides expert care to children from throughout the Pacific Northwest and Alaska.

Specialties include pediatric oncology, cardiac surgery, neurology, orthopedics, transplantation, and rare disease programs. Seattle Children's Research Institute is one of the top pediatric research programs in the country, driving innovations in childhood cancer and genetic medicine.
posts.address: 4800 Sand Point Way NE, Seattle, WA 98105, USA

posts.title: Harborview Medical Center – Seattle
posts.content:
Harborview Medical Center is the county hospital for King County and the only Level I Adult and Pediatric Trauma Center in Washington State, serving trauma patients from Washington, Alaska, Montana, and Idaho. It is operated by UW Medicine.

Harborview is nationally recognized for its trauma care, burn center, and emergency medicine. It also provides comprehensive specialty services including neurosurgery, orthopedics, psychiatry, and infectious disease. Harborview serves as a safety-net hospital for the region's most vulnerable populations.
posts.address: 325 9th Ave Main Hospital, Seattle, WA 98104, USA

posts.title: Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center – Seattle
posts.content:
Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center (Fred Hutch) is a world-renowned independent, nonprofit research and clinical care organization that stands at the forefront of cancer prevention, treatment, and cures. In 2022, Fred Hutch merged with Seattle Cancer Care Alliance to unify its research and clinical missions.

Fred Hutch is particularly known for pioneering bone marrow transplantation, developing multiple FDA-approved cancer therapies, and its world-leading HIV/AIDS prevention research. Its clinical programs include hematology/oncology, immunotherapy, solid tumor oncology, and clinical trials across all cancer types.
posts.address: 1100 Fairview Ave N, Seattle, WA 98109, USA

posts.title: Providence Regional Medical Center – Everett
posts.content:
Providence Regional Medical Center Everett is the largest hospital in Snohomish County and a major regional referral center serving north Puget Sound communities. Part of Providence, it provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services.

Services include Level II trauma care, cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. Providence Everett is accredited as a Comprehensive Stroke Center and is recognized for high quality and patient safety across its service lines.
posts.address: 1700 13th St, Everett, WA 98201, USA

posts.title: MultiCare Tacoma General Hospital
posts.content:
MultiCare Tacoma General Hospital is the flagship hospital of MultiCare Health System and a leading hospital in the Tacoma-Pierce County area. As a major teaching hospital, it provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services to the South Sound community.

Tacoma General is home to a Level II Trauma Center, a comprehensive cancer center, cardiovascular services, neuroscience, orthopedics, and women's health. It has consistently earned recognition for quality and patient safety from organizations including The Joint Commission and Leapfrog.
posts.address: 315 M.L.K. Jr Way, Tacoma, WA 98405, USA

posts.title: Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania
posts.content:
The Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania (HUP) is the flagship clinical entity of Penn Medicine and one of the nation's premier academic medical centers, consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Pennsylvania and the United States.

HUP provides world-class care across all specialties, with particular strengths in cancer, cardiovascular surgery, neuroscience, transplantation, and women's health. It was the site of the world's first general hospital (Pennsylvania Hospital) and continues to lead in medical innovation and clinical research.
posts.companyName: Hospital of the University of Pennsylvania (HUP)
posts.address: Maloney Building, 3400 Spruce St 5th Floor, Philadelphia, PA 19104, USA

posts.title: Jefferson Health – Thomas Jefferson University Hospital
posts.content:
Thomas Jefferson University Hospital is the flagship hospital of Jefferson Health and a nationally recognized academic medical center in Philadelphia. Affiliated with Sidney Kimmel Medical College, it provides expert care across dozens of specialties.

Jefferson is particularly renowned for its neuroscience program (Jefferson Comprehensive Epilepsy Center), orthopedics, cancer care, digestive disease, and women's health. Jefferson Health operates a large network of hospitals and outpatient facilities throughout the Philadelphia region and South Jersey.
posts.address: 111 S 11th St, Philadelphia, PA 19107, USA

posts.title: Children's Hospital of Philadelphia
posts.content:
Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) is the nation's first children's hospital, founded in 1855, and consistently ranked as one of the top children's hospitals in the United States. It is affiliated with the Perelman School of Medicine at the University of Pennsylvania.

CHOP is world-renowned for its cardiac surgery (pioneering the Fontan procedure), oncology, neurology, gene therapy, and rare disease programs. Its research institute is one of the largest pediatric research programs in the world, driving transformative cures for childhood diseases.
posts.address: 3401 Civic Center Blvd, Philadelphia, PA 19104, USA

posts.title: Temple University Hospital – Philadelphia
posts.content:
Temple University Hospital is the primary teaching hospital of Temple University Lewis Katz School of Medicine and a Level I Trauma Center serving North Philadelphia and surrounding communities. It is a major academic medical center with a strong mission in safety-net care.

Services include cardiovascular care, transplantation, lung care (renowned LVAD and lung transplant programs), oncology, orthopedics, and emergency medicine. Temple is particularly recognized for its lung transplant program and its commitment to community health in one of Philadelphia's most underserved areas.
posts.address: 3401 N Broad St, Philadelphia, PA 19140, USA

posts.title: Jefferson Einstein Medical Center – Philadelphia
posts.content:
Jefferson Einstein Medical Center (formerly Einstein Medical Center Philadelphia) is a major academic medical center and Level I Trauma Center in North Philadelphia, now part of Jefferson Health. It has served the Philadelphia community for over 150 years.

Services include emergency medicine, trauma care, cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, and a comprehensive kidney transplant program. Einstein Medical Center provides compassionate care to one of Philadelphia's most diverse patient populations.
posts.address: 5501 Old York Rd, Philadelphia, PA 19141, USA

posts.title: Penn Presbyterian Medical Center – Philadelphia
posts.content:
Penn Presbyterian Medical Center is a full-service community teaching hospital and part of the Penn Medicine system. Located in West Philadelphia, it provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services to local neighborhoods and serves as a major regional referral center.

Penn Presbyterian is particularly known for its Level I Trauma Center, comprehensive stroke center, cardiovascular care, surgical oncology, and orthopedics. It combines community-focused care with access to the full resources of Penn Medicine's academic health system.
posts.address: 51 N 39th St, Philadelphia, PA 19104, USA

posts.title: Lankenau Medical Center – Wynnewood
posts.content:
Lankenau Medical Center is a nationally recognized academic medical center in Wynnewood, Pennsylvania, part of Main Line Health and affiliated with Jefferson Health. It has earned numerous awards for quality, safety, and patient experience.

Specialties include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and comprehensive diagnostic imaging. The Lankenau Institute for Medical Research (LIMR) conducts basic and translational cancer research, linking scientific discovery to improved clinical outcomes for patients.
posts.companyName: Lankenau Medical Center – Main Line Health
posts.address: 100 E Lancaster Ave, Penn Wynne, PA 19096, USA

posts.title: Hahnemann University Hospital – Philadelphia
posts.content:
Brandywine Hospital is a community hospital in Coatesville, Pennsylvania, part of Tower Health, serving Chester County and surrounding communities in the greater Philadelphia region. It provides high-quality acute care with a strong focus on community health.

Services include emergency medicine, cardiac care, orthopedics, women's health, and surgical services. The hospital is committed to accessible, patient-centered care for residents of western Chester County and surrounding areas.
posts.address: 201 Reeceville Rd, Coatesville, PA 19320, USA

posts.title: Emory University Hospital – Atlanta
posts.content:
Emory University Hospital is the flagship hospital of Emory Healthcare, the most comprehensive academic health system in Georgia, and one of the leading academic medical centers in the Southeast. Affiliated with Emory University School of Medicine, it is consistently ranked among Georgia's best hospitals.

Specialties include cardiovascular medicine and surgery, transplantation (liver, kidney, heart, and lung), oncology, neuroscience, and orthopedics. Emory is recognized nationally for its research, including pioneering work in HIV/AIDS, transplantation, and cancer treatment.
posts.address: 1364 Clifton Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30322, USA

posts.title: Piedmont Atlanta Hospital
posts.content:
Piedmont Atlanta Hospital is a 504-bed acute care hospital and the flagship of Piedmont Healthcare, one of Georgia's largest health systems. Located in the Buckhead neighborhood, it provides comprehensive specialty and quaternary care to metro Atlanta.

Specialties include cardiovascular surgery, oncology (Piedmont Cancer Institute), orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. Piedmont Atlanta is consistently recognized for cardiac and vascular surgery excellence and has received numerous national quality awards.
posts.address: 1968 Peachtree Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30309, USA

posts.title: Children's Healthcare of Atlanta
posts.content:
Children's Healthcare of Atlanta (CHOA) is one of the largest pediatric clinical care providers in the United States and consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the nation. It operates three hospital campuses and dozens of specialty care locations throughout Georgia.

CHOA specializes in pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neurology, neonatology, and solid organ transplantation. It is affiliated with Emory University School of Medicine and Morehouse School of Medicine, and is a national leader in pediatric clinical research.
posts.address: 1405 Clifton Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30322, USA

posts.title: Grady Memorial Hospital – Atlanta
posts.content:
Grady Memorial Hospital is one of the largest public hospitals in the United States and the primary safety-net hospital for Atlanta and Fulton and DeKalb counties. It is a Level I Trauma Center and serves as the teaching hospital for Emory University and Morehouse School of Medicine.

Grady provides comprehensive care including emergency medicine, trauma surgery, burn care, neurology, HIV/AIDS services, and a wide range of specialty clinics. Its burn center is one of the largest in the Southeast and is internationally recognized for excellence in burn care and research.
posts.address: 80 Jesse Hill Jr Dr SE, Atlanta, GA 30303, USA

posts.title: WellStar Atlanta Medical Center
posts.content:
WellStar Atlanta Medical Center is a leading acute care hospital in downtown Atlanta, part of WellStar Health System, the largest health system in Georgia. It provides comprehensive inpatient and outpatient care with a focus on cardiovascular excellence and trauma.

Services include Level I Trauma care, cardiac and vascular surgery, neuroscience, oncology, orthopedics, and emergency medicine. WellStar Atlanta Medical Center has been recognized for outstanding cardiac care and participates in national quality improvement initiatives.
posts.address: 303 Parkway Dr NE, Atlanta, GA 30312, USA

posts.title: Northside Hospital – Atlanta
posts.content:
Northside Hospital in Sandy Springs is one of the most comprehensive hospitals in Georgia and is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in the state. Northside Hospital is one of the busiest birthing hospitals in the nation and a leader in cancer care.

The hospital is home to the Cancer Institute at Northside Hospital, a nationally recognized cancer treatment and research program, as well as comprehensive cardiac, orthopedic, and women's health services. Northside delivers more babies annually than virtually any other hospital in the Southeast.
posts.address: 1000 Johnson Ferry Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30342, USA

posts.title: Marcus Autism Center – Atlanta
posts.content:
Marcus Autism Center is one of the largest and most experienced autism treatment centers in the nation, serving children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and related developmental disabilities. It is part of Children's Healthcare of Atlanta and affiliated with Emory University School of Medicine.

Services include comprehensive diagnostic evaluations, intensive behavioral intervention, social skills training, family support, and research programs. Marcus Autism Center is a national leader in applied behavior analysis and telehealth delivery of autism services.
posts.companyName: Marcus Autism Center – Children's Healthcare of Atlanta
posts.address: 1920 Briarcliff Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30329, USA

posts.title: Shepherd Center – Atlanta
posts.content:
Shepherd Center is a private, not-for-profit hospital in Atlanta specializing in medical treatment, research, and rehabilitation for people with spinal cord injury, brain injury, stroke, multiple sclerosis, spine and chronic pain, and other neuological conditions.

Consistently ranked among the top rehabilitation hospitals in the United States, Shepherd Center provides acute care and inpatient/outpatient rehabilitation. Its research program addresses some of the most challenging questions in neurorehabilitation, and its Shepherd Center Sports and Recreation Program helps patients return to active lives.
posts.address: 2020 Peachtree Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30309, USA

posts.title: Emory Rehabilitation Hospital – Atlanta
posts.content:
Emory Rehabilitation Hospital is a comprehensive inpatient rehabilitation hospital in Atlanta, part of Emory Healthcare. It provides expert rehabilitation services to patients recovering from stroke, brain injury, spinal cord injury, orthopedic surgery, and other conditions requiring intensive therapy.

Services include physical therapy, occupational therapy, speech-language pathology, neuropsychology, and specialized programs for stroke, brain injury, and amputee rehabilitation. Emory Rehabilitation Hospital is affiliated with Emory University School of Medicine and incorporates evidence-based research into all clinical programs.
posts.address: 1441 Clifton Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30322, USA

posts.title: UCSF Medical Center – San Francisco
posts.content:
UCSF Medical Center is one of the world's leading academic medical centers, consistently ranked among the best hospitals in the United States and California. Affiliated with UC San Francisco School of Medicine, it combines world-class clinical care with groundbreaking research.

Specialties include cancer (UCSF Helen Diller Family Comprehensive Cancer Center), neuroscience, transplantation, cardiovascular surgery, pediatrics (UCSF Benioff Children's Hospitals), and precision medicine. UCSF is particularly known for its pioneering work in HIV/AIDS, genomics, and cell therapy.
posts.address: 505 Parnassus Ave, San Francisco, CA 94143, USA

posts.title: Stanford Health Care – Stanford Medical Center
posts.content:
Stanford Health Care is one of the nation's premier academic health systems, affiliated with Stanford University School of Medicine. It offers extraordinary care across virtually every specialty, combining clinical excellence with pioneering research and innovation.

Stanford is particularly renowned for its cardiovascular program, cancer care (Stanford Cancer Center), neuroscience, organ transplantation, and precision health initiatives. Its proximity to Silicon Valley drives a unique culture of technology-driven medical innovation.
posts.address: 300 N Pasteur Dr, Stanford, CA 94305, USA

posts.title: Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital
posts.content:
Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital is the only Level I Trauma Center in San Francisco and the primary safety-net hospital for the city and county. Affiliated with UCSF School of Medicine, it provides expert care to all patients regardless of ability to pay.

Services include trauma surgery, emergency medicine, psychiatry, HIV/AIDS care, addiction medicine, and a broad range of specialty clinics. ZSFG is internationally recognized for its HIV/AIDS programs and its commitment to health equity and social justice in medicine.
posts.companyName: Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital and Trauma Center
posts.address: 1001 Potrero Ave, San Francisco, CA 94110, USA

posts.title: California Pacific Medical Center – SF
posts.content:
California Pacific Medical Center (CPMC) is one of the largest hospitals in San Francisco and a major teaching hospital affiliated with several medical schools. Part of Sutter Health, it provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services across multiple campuses.

CPMC specialties include cardiac and vascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. Its Van Ness campus is a state-of-the-art facility that opened in 2019 and is recognized as one of the most advanced hospital buildings in the country.
posts.address: 1101 Van Ness Ave, San Francisco, CA 94109, USA

posts.title: UCSF Benioff Children's Hospital – Oakland
posts.content:
UCSF Benioff Children's Hospital Oakland is a leading children's hospital serving the East Bay and broader Northern California region. Affiliated with UCSF, it is consistently ranked among the top children's hospitals in the nation and provides specialized care for children with the most complex conditions.

Specialties include pediatric oncology, cardiac surgery, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and rare diseases. The hospital has a long history of breakthrough research in pediatric sickle cell disease, cancer genomics, and newborn medicine.
posts.address: 747 52nd St, Oakland, CA 94609, USA

posts.title: Alta Bates Summit Medical Center – Oakland
posts.content:
Alta Bates Summit Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital system in the East Bay, operating two campuses in Berkeley and Oakland as part of Sutter Health. It is one of the leading hospitals in the greater San Francisco Bay Area.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, women's health, Level II trauma care, and a comprehensive neonatal intensive care unit. The hospital is particularly recognized for its cardiovascular and cancer programs and holds multiple national quality designations.
posts.companyName: Alta Bates Summit Medical Center (Sutter Health)
posts.address: 2450 Ashby Ave, Berkeley, CA 94705, USA

posts.title: El Camino Health – Mountain View
posts.content:
