El Camino Health is an independent, nonprofit health system serving Silicon Valley and the greater San Francisco Bay Area, operating hospitals in Mountain View and Los Gatos. It has been recognized as one of the nation's most innovative community health systems.

El Camino Health is known for its cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, and behavioral health programs. It was one of the first hospitals in the nation to use electronic health records and robotic surgery, reflecting its culture of technological innovation in patient care.
posts.address: 2500 Grant Rd, Mountain View, CA 94040, USA

posts.title: Lucile Packard Children's Hospital – Palo Alto
posts.content:
Lucile Packard Children's Hospital Stanford is one of the nation's leading children's hospitals and the pediatric and obstetrics center for Stanford Medicine. Located in Palo Alto, it provides specialized care for children and expectant mothers with the most complex medical needs.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, neonatology, orthopedics, and fetal surgery. Packard Children's is consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the United States and is affiliated with Stanford University School of Medicine.
posts.address: 725 Welch Rd, Palo Alto, CA 94304, USA

posts.title: John Muir Medical Center – Walnut Creek
posts.content:
John Muir Medical Center in Walnut Creek is a leading acute care hospital serving Contra Costa County and the greater East Bay region. Part of John Muir Health, it provides comprehensive specialty and emergency care to the community.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, Level II trauma care, and comprehensive women's health. John Muir Medical Center is consistently recognized for clinical quality and patient safety, including Magnet designation for nursing excellence.
posts.companyName: John Muir Medical Center – Walnut Creek
posts.address: 1601 Ygnacio Valley Rd, Walnut Creek, CA 94598, USA

posts.title: Kaiser Permanente San Francisco Medical Center
posts.content:
Kaiser Permanente San Francisco Medical Center is a full-service hospital and medical office complex serving Kaiser Permanente members in San Francisco and the surrounding Bay Area. It is one of the flagship Kaiser facilities in Northern California.

Services include emergency medicine, cardiac care, oncology, orthopedics, obstetrics, pediatrics, and behavioral health. Kaiser SF is known for its integrated care model, which coordinates all aspects of a patient's health care — from prevention and wellness to specialist treatment — in a seamless, coordinated system.
posts.companyName: Kaiser Permanente San Francisco Medical Center
posts.address: 2425 Geary Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94115, USA

posts.title: Mayo Clinic Hospital – Phoenix
posts.content:
Mayo Clinic Hospital in Phoenix is part of the world-famous Mayo Clinic system and provides the same extraordinary standard of care for which Mayo is globally renowned. It is consistently ranked as one of the top hospitals in Arizona and the Mountain West region.

Specialties include cancer (Mayo Clinic Cancer Center), cardiovascular surgery, neuroscience, transplantation, orthopedics, and complex surgical care. Mayo Clinic Phoenix operates in close coordination with the main Mayo campus in Rochester, Minnesota, giving patients access to the combined expertise of the entire Mayo system.
posts.address: 5777 E Mayo Blvd, Phoenix, AZ 85054, USA

posts.title: Banner University Medical Center – Phoenix
posts.content:
Banner University Medical Center Phoenix is an academic medical center affiliated with the University of Arizona College of Medicine – Phoenix. Part of Banner Health, it is one of the leading hospitals in Arizona and serves as a major Level I Trauma Center for the Phoenix region.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, oncology, neuroscience, transplantation, orthopedics, and a comprehensive burn center. The hospital is committed to advancing medicine through research and graduate medical education while providing exceptional clinical care to the Phoenix community.
posts.address: 1111 E McDowell Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85006, USA

posts.title: Dignity Health St. Joseph's Hospital – Phoenix
posts.content:
St. Joseph's Hospital and Medical Center is one of Arizona's most respected nonprofit hospitals, part of Dignity Health and named one of the 100 Great Hospitals in America. Located in central Phoenix, it provides comprehensive acute care with a focus on compassion and excellence.

St. Joseph's is home to the Barrow Neurological Institute — the world's largest neurological disease treatment and research institution — as well as a Level I Trauma Center, cancer services, cardiac care, and orthopedics. Barrow alone makes this hospital a worldwide destination for complex neurological cases.
posts.companyName: Dignity Health – St. Joseph's Hospital and Medical Center
posts.address: 350 W Thomas Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85013, USA

posts.title: HonorHealth Scottsdale Osborn Medical Center
posts.content:
HonorHealth Scottsdale Osborn Medical Center is one of the most comprehensive hospitals in the greater Scottsdale area, part of HonorHealth — the largest locally governed health system in Arizona. It provides advanced specialty care to the entire Scottsdale and greater Phoenix metropolitan area.

Specialties include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. The hospital is recognized for its cardiac catheterization laboratories, electrophysiology program, and its commitment to medical education and community health.
posts.address: 7400 E Osborn Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85251, USA

posts.title: Phoenix Children's Hospital
posts.content:
Phoenix Children's Hospital is the largest children's hospital in the Southwest and one of the top pediatric hospitals in the nation. It provides expert, compassionate care to children with the most complex medical conditions from across Arizona and the region.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and rare diseases. Phoenix Children's is consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the United States and is a major center for pediatric research and clinical innovation.
posts.address: 1919 E Thomas Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85016, USA

posts.title: Valleywise Health Medical Center – Phoenix
posts.content:
Valleywise Health Medical Center is Maricopa County's only public hospital and a Level I Trauma Center serving the greater Phoenix region. It is the safety-net hospital for Maricopa County and affiliated with the University of Arizona College of Medicine – Phoenix.

Services include emergency medicine, trauma surgery, burn care, psychiatry (Arizona's largest psychiatric emergency program), obstetrics, and a full range of specialty clinics. Valleywise Health is committed to providing care to all patients regardless of insurance status.
posts.address: 2601 E Roosevelt St, Phoenix, AZ 85008, USA

posts.title: Scottsdale Health – Scottsdale Healthcare Shea
posts.content:
HonorHealth Scottsdale Shea Medical Center is a comprehensive acute care hospital in north Scottsdale, known for its state-of-the-art facilities and advanced surgical capabilities. As part of HonorHealth, it serves the rapidly growing north Phoenix and Scottsdale communities.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer treatment, orthopedic and spine surgery, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. The hospital has earned numerous recognitions for quality and patient safety, including the Leapfrog Hospital Safety Grade A designation.
posts.address: 9003 E Shea Blvd, Scottsdale, AZ 85260, USA

posts.title: Abrazo Arizona Heart Hospital – Phoenix
posts.content:
Abrazo Arizona Heart Hospital is one of the nation's premier specialty hospitals dedicated exclusively to cardiac care, located in Phoenix. Part of Tenet Health, it provides advanced cardiovascular services to patients throughout the Southwest.

Services include open heart surgery, cardiac catheterization, electrophysiology, structural heart disease treatment, and advanced heart failure management. The hospital is recognized for outstanding outcomes in cardiac surgery and interventional cardiology, with accreditation from The Joint Commission for advanced heart failure care.
posts.address: 1930 E Thomas Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85016, USA

posts.title: Banner MD Anderson Cancer Center – Gilbert
posts.content:
Banner MD Anderson Cancer Center in Gilbert, Arizona is a collaboration between Banner Health and MD Anderson Cancer Center, bringing the oncology expertise of one of the world's top cancer institutions to the greater Phoenix metropolitan area.

Services include medical oncology, radiation therapy, surgical oncology, cancer genetics, and clinical trials access linked to MD Anderson's research enterprise. Patients in Arizona can now access MD Anderson's protocols and multidisciplinary tumor boards without traveling to Houston.
posts.address: 2946 E Banner Gateway Dr, Gilbert, AZ 85234, USA

posts.title: Chandler Regional Medical Center – Chandler
posts.content:
Chandler Regional Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital in the Southeast Valley, part of Dignity Health. It provides comprehensive medical and surgical services to the growing communities of Chandler, Gilbert, Mesa, and surrounding areas.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. Chandler Regional was named one of the 100 Top Hospitals in the country and holds recognition for its cardiac, surgical, and maternal care programs.
posts.companyName: Dignity Health – Chandler Regional Medical Center
posts.address: 1955 W Frye Rd, Chandler, AZ 85224, USA

posts.title: UCHealth University of Colorado Hospital – Aurora
posts.content:
UCHealth University of Colorado Hospital is the flagship academic medical center for the University of Colorado School of Medicine and one of the leading hospitals in the Rocky Mountain region. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Colorado and the Mountain West.

Specialties include cancer (University of Colorado Cancer Center), cardiovascular surgery, transplantation, neuroscience, orthopedics, and high-risk obstetrics. The hospital is a major destination for complex cases from across Colorado, Wyoming, and surrounding states.
posts.address: 12605 E 16th Ave, Aurora, CO 80045, USA

posts.title: Children's Hospital Colorado – Aurora
posts.content:
Children's Hospital Colorado is the leading pediatric hospital in the Rocky Mountain region and consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the nation. It provides expert care to children with the most complex conditions from across Colorado and neighboring states.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, gastroenterology, and neonatology. Children's Hospital Colorado operates multiple specialty care clinics throughout the state, bringing expert pediatric care closer to families across the region.
posts.address: 13123 E 16th Ave, Aurora, CO 80045, USA

posts.title: SCL Health Saint Joseph Hospital – Denver
posts.content:
Saint Joseph Hospital is one of Denver's most respected academic medical centers, part of SCL Health and affiliated with Rocky Vista University. Located in the Capitol Hill neighborhood, it has served the Denver community for over 150 years.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. Saint Joseph is particularly recognized for its Level II Trauma Center, its robust graduate medical education programs, and its commitment to community health in central Denver.
posts.companyName: SCL Health Saint Joseph Hospital Denver
posts.address: 1375 E 19th Ave, Denver, CO 80218, USA

posts.title: Denver Health Medical Center
posts.content:
Denver Health Medical Center is the safety-net hospital for the City and County of Denver, a Level I Trauma Center, and a major academic medical center affiliated with the University of Colorado School of Medicine. It is one of the most cost-efficient health care systems in the country.

Services include emergency medicine, trauma surgery, burn care, primary care, behavioral health, and over 40 specialty clinics. Denver Health operates an extensive network of community health centers across Denver and provides care to over 185,000 patients annually regardless of ability to pay.
posts.address: 777 Bannock St, Denver, CO 80204, USA

posts.title: Craig Hospital – Englewood
posts.content:
Craig Hospital in Englewood, Colorado is a world-renowned rehabilitation hospital specializing exclusively in the treatment and rehabilitation of people with spinal cord injury and traumatic brain injury. It is consistently ranked among the top rehabilitation hospitals in the United States.

Craig Hospital provides acute rehabilitation, long-term follow-up care, research, and community reintegration programs. Its outcomes for spinal cord and brain injury patients are among the best in the world, and it draws patients from across the United States and internationally.
posts.address: 3425 S Clarkson St, Englewood, CO 80113, USA

posts.title: Porter Adventist Hospital – Denver
posts.content:
Porter Adventist Hospital is a faith-based, acute care hospital in south Denver, part of Centura Health. It provides comprehensive medical and surgical services with a holistic approach to healing that addresses the physical, emotional, and spiritual needs of patients.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics and joint replacement, neuroscience, bariatric surgery, and emergency medicine. Porter Adventist is recognized for its outstanding surgical programs and its welcoming, healing environment.
posts.address: 2525 S Downing St, Denver, CO 80210, USA

posts.title: Vail Health Hospital – Vail
posts.content:
Vail Health Hospital is a nationally recognized community hospital in Vail, Colorado, serving the resort communities of the Eagle River Valley. It is particularly known for its world-class orthopedic and sports medicine programs, treating elite athletes and recreational patients alike.

The Steadman Clinic, co-located with Vail Health, is one of the most renowned orthopedic surgery practices in the world, specializing in knee, hip, and shoulder reconstruction. Vail Health also provides comprehensive emergency care, cardiac services, and outpatient specialty clinics for the mountain community.
posts.address: 180 S Frontage Rd W, Vail, CO 81657, USA

posts.title: Sky Ridge Medical Center – Lone Tree
posts.content:
Sky Ridge Medical Center is a state-of-the-art acute care hospital in Lone Tree, Colorado, part of HCA HealthONE — the largest health system in the Denver metropolitan area. It serves the rapidly growing south suburban communities with comprehensive specialty care.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, women's health, Level II trauma care, and neonatal intensive care. Sky Ridge is consistently recognized for clinical excellence and patient experience, earning multiple national quality designations and awards.
posts.address: 10101 RidgeGate Pkwy, Lone Tree, CO 80124, USA

posts.title: Cleveland Clinic Main Campus
posts.content:
Cleveland Clinic is one of the most respected hospitals in the world, consistently ranked #2 in the United States by U.S. News & World Report and #1 in cardiology and cardiac surgery for over 25 consecutive years. Its main campus in Cleveland, Ohio is home to thousands of physicians and researchers across virtually every specialty.

Cleveland Clinic pioneered the first face transplant in the United States and numerous other medical firsts. Its Sydell and Arnold Miller Family Heart, Vascular & Thoracic Institute is the world's largest dedicated heart and vascular center, treating the most complex cardiac cases from around the globe.
posts.address: 9500 Euclid Ave, Cleveland, OH 44195, USA

posts.title: University Hospitals Cleveland Medical Center
posts.content:
University Hospitals Cleveland Medical Center is the principal teaching hospital of Case Western Reserve University School of Medicine and one of the leading academic medical centers in the nation. It is consistently ranked among Ohio's top hospitals.

UH Cleveland specializes in cancer (Seidman Cancer Center), cardiovascular care, neuroscience, orthopedics, transplantation, and pediatrics (UH Rainbow Babies & Children's Hospital). The medical center has a long history of medical firsts, including performing one of the first successful kidney transplants in the United States.
posts.address: 11100 Euclid Ave, Cleveland, OH 44106, USA

posts.title: MetroHealth Medical Center – Cleveland
posts.content:
MetroHealth Medical Center is Cuyahoga County's public hospital and a Level I Trauma Center, providing comprehensive care to over 300,000 patients annually. Affiliated with Case Western Reserve University, it is a major academic medical center and safety-net hospital for the greater Cleveland area.

Services include emergency medicine, trauma surgery, burn care, primary care, mental health services, and a wide range of specialty clinics. MetroHealth's new main campus building, opened in 2022, is one of the most advanced hospital facilities in Ohio.
posts.address: 2500 Metrohealth Dr, Cleveland, OH 44109, USA

posts.title: Nationwide Children's Hospital – Columbus
posts.content:
Nationwide Children's Hospital in Columbus is one of the largest and most comprehensive children's hospitals in the United States, consistently ranked among the top children's hospitals in the nation. Affiliated with the Ohio State University College of Medicine, it treats children with the most complex conditions from across Ohio and beyond.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and rare diseases. Nationwide Children's Research Institute is one of the top ten pediatric research programs in the country, pioneering gene therapy for spinal muscular atrophy and other rare diseases.
posts.address: 700 Children's Dr, Columbus, OH 43205, USA

posts.title: Ohio State University Wexner Medical Center – Columbus
posts.content:
The Ohio State University Wexner Medical Center is the academic medical center of The Ohio State University, one of the nation's largest and most comprehensive academic health systems. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Ohio and the United States.

OSU Wexner specializes in cancer (James Cancer Hospital and Solove Research Institute — an NCI-designated Comprehensive Cancer Center), cardiovascular medicine, neuroscience, transplantation, and orthopedics. Its research enterprise spans clinical trials, basic science, and translational medicine.
posts.companyName: The Ohio State University Wexner Medical Center
posts.address: 520 W 10th Ave, Columbus, OH 43210, USA

posts.title: Cincinnati Children's Hospital Medical Center
posts.content:
Cincinnati Children's Hospital Medical Center is one of the oldest and most distinguished pediatric hospitals in the United States, consistently ranked #3 among all children's hospitals nationwide. Affiliated with the University of Cincinnati College of Medicine, it is a national and international leader in pediatric research and clinical innovation.

Specialties include pediatric oncology, cardiac surgery, gastroenterology, neurology, and rare diseases. Cincinnati Children's is particularly renowned for its digestive disease program, liver transplant program, and its internationally recognized research in fetal and neonatal medicine.
posts.address: 3333 Burnet Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45229, USA

posts.title: University of Cincinnati Medical Center
posts.content:
University of Cincinnati Medical Center is the flagship academic hospital of UC Health and the clinical partner of the University of Cincinnati College of Medicine. It is a Level I Trauma Center and a major referral center for complex cases throughout the Tri-State area.

Specialties include stroke neurology (one of the highest-volume stroke programs in the nation), cardiovascular surgery, transplantation, oncology, and orthopedics. UC Medical Center has a long history of pioneering the field of clot-busting treatment for stroke.
posts.companyName: UC Health – University of Cincinnati Medical Center
posts.address: 3188 Bellevue Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45219, USA

posts.title: Cleveland Clinic Akron General
posts.content:
Cleveland Clinic Akron General is a major academic medical center and the flagship hospital for Summit County, bringing the full resources of the Cleveland Clinic health system to the Akron region. It is consistently ranked among the top hospitals in Ohio.

Services include cardiovascular care, oncology, Level II trauma care, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. As part of Cleveland Clinic, Akron General gives patients access to world-renowned specialists and the clinical expertise of one of the world's leading health systems.
posts.address: 1 Akron General Ave, Akron, OH 44307, USA

posts.title: Mayo Clinic – Rochester, Minnesota
posts.content:
Mayo Clinic in Rochester, Minnesota is the #1 ranked hospital in the United States by U.S. News & World Report and the world's most famous medical destination. Founded in 1889, it invented the concept of the multispecialty group practice and draws patients from all 50 states and over 140 countries annually.

Mayo Clinic Rochester treats the most difficult medical cases in virtually every specialty, supported by the largest integrated physician group practice in the world. Its model of collaborative, patient-centered medicine sets the global standard for how medicine should be practiced.
posts.address: 200 1st St SW, Rochester, MN 55905, USA

posts.title: University of Minnesota Medical Center – Minneapolis
posts.content:
University of Minnesota Medical Center is the academic medical center of M Health Fairview and the clinical partner of the University of Minnesota Medical School. It is one of the leading hospitals in the Upper Midwest and a major destination for complex specialty care.

The medical center is world-renowned for its organ transplant programs — it performed the world's first successful bone marrow transplant here — and also excels in cardiovascular surgery, cancer, neuroscience, and rare disease management. Its transplant program remains one of the highest-volume programs in the world.
posts.companyName: M Health Fairview – University of Minnesota Medical Center
posts.address: 2450 Riverside Ave, Minneapolis, MN 55454, USA

posts.title: Abbott Northwestern Hospital – Minneapolis
posts.content:
Abbott Northwestern Hospital is the largest hospital in Minneapolis and the flagship of Allina Health. Consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Minnesota, it provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services to the Twin Cities metropolitan area.

Specialties include cardiovascular care (Virginia Piper Cancer Institute), cancer, neuroscience, orthopedics, and heart and vascular care at the Minneapolis Heart Institute — one of the nation's busiest cardiovascular programs. Abbott Northwestern holds Magnet designation for nursing excellence.
posts.address: 800 E 28th St, Minneapolis, MN 55407, USA

posts.title: Children's Minnesota – Minneapolis
posts.content:
Children's Minnesota is the largest freestanding pediatric health system in the upper Midwest, with hospitals in Minneapolis and St. Paul and a network of specialty clinics throughout Minnesota and western Wisconsin. It is consistently ranked among the best children's hospitals in the nation.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, neonatology, and orthopedics. Children's Minnesota is a national leader in family-centered care and pediatric research, and is one of the few children's hospital systems in the country to operate in two major metropolitan areas.
posts.address: 2525 Chicago Ave, Minneapolis, MN 55404, USA

posts.title: Regions Hospital – Saint Paul
posts.content:
Regions Hospital in Saint Paul is a nationally recognized Level I Trauma Center and the flagship hospital of HealthPartners, one of the largest consumer-governed health systems in the United States. It provides comprehensive care to patients throughout the Twin Cities region and eastern Minnesota.

Regions is particularly known for its trauma center (one of the busiest in the region), burn center, emergency psychiatry, cardiovascular care, and orthopedics. It is affiliated with the University of Minnesota Medical School and runs extensive graduate medical education programs.
posts.address: 640 Jackson St, St Paul, MN 55101, USA

posts.title: Hennepin Healthcare – Minneapolis
posts.content:
Hennepin Healthcare (formerly Hennepin County Medical Center) is the largest safety-net hospital in Minnesota and a Level I Trauma Center serving Minneapolis and Hennepin County. Affiliated with the University of Minnesota, it is a major academic medical center and emergency care hub for the region.

HCMC provides a full range of inpatient and outpatient services including emergency medicine, trauma surgery, addiction medicine, behavioral health, and over 50 specialty clinics. Its emergency department is one of the busiest in the upper Midwest.
posts.address: 701 Park Ave, Minneapolis, MN 55404, USA

posts.title: Park Nicollet Methodist Hospital – Saint Louis Park
posts.content:
Park Nicollet Methodist Hospital is an award-winning acute care hospital in Saint Louis Park, part of HealthPartners. It is consistently recognized as one of the top hospitals in Minnesota for quality and patient safety.

Specialties include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, bariatric surgery, women's health, and emergency medicine. Park Nicollet Methodist is home to a nationally recognized bariatric surgery program and a comprehensive cancer center, and has earned Magnet designation for nursing excellence.
posts.address: 6500 Excelsior Blvd, St Louis Park, MN 55426, USA

posts.title: Essentia Health – Duluth
posts.content:
Essentia Health St. Mary's Medical Center is the flagship hospital of Essentia Health, a multistate health system serving patients across Minnesota, Wisconsin, and North Dakota. Located in Duluth, it is the major tertiary care center for the Lake Superior region.

Services include cardiac surgery, cancer care, orthopedics, neuroscience, Level II trauma care, and a comprehensive neonatal intensive care unit. St. Mary's is the largest hospital in northeastern Minnesota and serves as a regional referral center for complex cases throughout the tri-state area.
posts.companyName: Essentia Health – St. Mary's Medical Center
posts.address: 402 E 2nd St, Duluth, MN 55805, USA

posts.title: Johns Hopkins Hospital – Baltimore
posts.content:
The Johns Hopkins Hospital in Baltimore is one of the most legendary medical institutions in the world, ranked #1 in the United States for over 20 consecutive years. Affiliated with Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine, it has been at the forefront of medicine, nursing, and biomedical research since its founding in 1889.

Hopkins pioneered countless medical advances including the discovery of rehydration therapy, CPR, and numerous cancer treatments. Its specialties span all fields, with particular recognition in neurosurgery, oncology, rheumatology, urology, psychiatry, and cardiac surgery.
posts.address: 1800 Orleans St, Baltimore, MD 21287, USA

posts.title: University of Maryland Medical Center – Baltimore
posts.content:
University of Maryland Medical Center is the flagship hospital of the University of Maryland Medical System and a leading academic medical center affiliated with the University of Maryland School of Medicine. It is home to one of the world's busiest shock trauma centers.

The R Adams Cowley Shock Trauma Center at UMMC pioneered the concept of the 'Golden Hour' in trauma care and is internationally recognized as the model for trauma systems worldwide. UMMC also excels in cardiovascular surgery, organ transplantation, neuroscience, and cancer care.
posts.address: 22 S Greene St, Baltimore, MD 21201, USA

posts.title: Sinai Hospital of Baltimore
posts.content:
Sinai Hospital of Baltimore is one of Maryland's largest teaching hospitals and the flagship of LifeBridge Health. Part of the Johns Hopkins Health System, it provides comprehensive medical and surgical care to the greater Baltimore metropolitan area.

Specialties include the Alvin and Lois Lapidus Cancer Institute, comprehensive cardiac care, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. Sinai Hospital is particularly recognized for its orthopedic surgery program and its commitment to graduate medical education with residency programs in over 30 specialties.
posts.address: 2401 W Belvedere Ave, Baltimore, MD 21215, USA

posts.title: MedStar Union Memorial Hospital – Baltimore
posts.content:
MedStar Union Memorial Hospital is a comprehensive teaching hospital in north Baltimore, part of MedStar Health — the largest not-for-profit healthcare provider in the mid-Atlantic region. It has served the Baltimore community since 1854.

Union Memorial is nationally recognized for its orthopedic and sports medicine programs, including the Curtis National Hand Center — the world's largest hand surgery center. Other specialties include cardiovascular care, vascular surgery, oncology, and emergency medicine.
posts.address: 201 E University Pkwy, Baltimore, MD 21218, USA

posts.title: Greater Baltimore Medical Center
posts.content:
Greater Baltimore Medical Center is an independent, not-for-profit, community hospital located in Towson, Maryland, serving Baltimore County and the surrounding region. GBMC is consistently recognized as one of the most respected hospitals in the mid-Atlantic region.

GBMC offers a comprehensive range of services including cardiovascular care, cancer treatment, obstetrics (one of the largest birthing centers in Maryland), orthopedics, and emergency medicine. The hospital has won numerous national awards for quality, patient safety, and patient experience.
posts.address: 6701 N Charles St, Towson, MD 21204, USA

posts.title: MedStar Good Samaritan Hospital – Baltimore
posts.content:
MedStar Good Samaritan Hospital is an acute care hospital in northeast Baltimore, part of the MedStar Health network. It provides high-quality medical and surgical care with a particular focus on geriatric medicine and rehabilitation services for the surrounding communities.

Services include geriatric care, orthopedics, cardiac care, rehabilitation medicine, and emergency services. Good Samaritan is affiliated with Johns Hopkins Medicine and is known for its compassionate approach to caring for older adults and its comprehensive rehabilitation programs.
posts.address: 5601 Loch Raven Blvd, Baltimore, MD 21239, USA

posts.title: Johns Hopkins Bayview Medical Center
posts.content:
Johns Hopkins Bayview Medical Center is one of four Johns Hopkins Medicine hospitals, located in southeast Baltimore. It provides comprehensive medical and surgical services with the same commitment to excellence for which the Johns Hopkins name is globally known.

Bayview Medical Center houses one of the nation's largest sleep disorders centers, a comprehensive burn center, a geriatric medicine program, and Level II trauma care. It serves as a major research and teaching hospital, with multiple clinical trials and graduate medical education programs in operation.
posts.address: 4940 Eastern Ave, Baltimore, MD 21224, USA

posts.title: National Institutes of Health Clinical Center – Bethesda
posts.content:
The NIH Clinical Center in Bethesda, Maryland is the world's largest hospital dedicated entirely to clinical research, operating as part of the National Institutes of Health. Since opening in 1953, it has enrolled over 500,000 volunteers in clinical studies.

The Clinical Center does not accept patients seeking routine medical care — instead, it exclusively treats patients enrolled in research protocols. It houses 200 outpatient clinics and 243 inpatient beds, conducting studies across cancer, infectious disease, rare diseases, cardiovascular conditions, and many other areas of medicine.
posts.address: 10 Center Dr, Bethesda, MD 20892, USA

posts.title: Vanderbilt University Medical Center – Nashville
posts.content:
Vanderbilt University Medical Center (VUMC) is one of the nation's premier academic medical centers, consistently ranked among the best hospitals in Tennessee and the United States. Affiliated with Vanderbilt University School of Medicine, it combines world-class clinical care with leading research programs.

VUMC is particularly renowned for its cancer care (Vanderbilt-Ingram Cancer Center), cardiac surgery, neuroscience, transplantation, and precision medicine. Its biomedical informatics program is one of the most advanced in the world, driving innovations in data-driven medicine and personalized health care.
posts.address: 1211 Medical Center Dr, Nashville, TN 37232, USA

posts.title: Monroe Carell Jr. Children's Hospital – Nashville
posts.content:
Monroe Carell Jr. Children's Hospital at Vanderbilt is the region's only freestanding children's hospital and consistently ranked among the top children's hospitals in the Southeast. Part of Vanderbilt University Medical Center, it provides specialized pediatric care to children from across Tennessee and surrounding states.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, neonatology, and rare diseases. The hospital is a leader in pediatric clinical research and provides family-centered care in a healing, child-friendly environment.
posts.companyName: Monroe Carell Jr. Children's Hospital at Vanderbilt
posts.address: 2200 Children's Way, Nashville, TN 37232, USA

posts.title: TriStar Centennial Medical Center – Nashville
posts.content:
TriStar Centennial Medical Center is the flagship hospital of HCA Healthcare's TriStar Health network in Middle Tennessee. As a Level II Trauma Center, it provides comprehensive acute care across dozens of specialties to the Nashville metropolitan area.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, women's health, neuroscience, and a dedicated children's hospital (TriStar Children's). TriStar Centennial is consistently recognized for clinical excellence and patient safety by national organizations.
posts.address: 2300 Patterson St, Nashville, TN 37203, USA

posts.title: Saint Thomas Midtown Hospital – Nashville
posts.content:
Ascension Saint Thomas Midtown Hospital is a faith-based academic medical center in Nashville, part of Ascension — the nation's largest Catholic and nonprofit health system. It has been serving the Nashville community for over 100 years.

Saint Thomas Midtown offers comprehensive services including cardiovascular care, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, and women's health. It is known for its highly specialized cardiac and vascular program and its tradition of compassionate, mission-driven care for all patients.
posts.address: 2000 Church St, Nashville, TN 37203, USA

posts.title: Baptist Memorial Hospital – Memphis
posts.content:
Baptist Memorial Hospital in Memphis is the flagship of Baptist Memorial Health Care, one of the largest not-for-profit health systems in the Mid-South. It is a comprehensive Level II Trauma Center providing acute care to patients throughout the Memphis region and surrounding tri-state area.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. Baptist Memorial is committed to combining advanced medical technology with compassionate, patient-centered care.
posts.address: 6019 Walnut Grove Rd, Memphis, TN 38120, USA

posts.title: Le Bonheur Children's Hospital – Memphis
posts.content:
Le Bonheur Children's Hospital is one of the top pediatric hospitals in the Mid-South, providing specialized care to children from across Tennessee, Arkansas, and Mississippi. Affiliated with the University of Tennessee Health Science Center, it is consistently ranked among the nation's best children's hospitals.

Specialties include pediatric neuroscience (one of the highest-volume pediatric neurosurgery programs in the country), cardiac care, oncology, orthopedics, and neonatology. Le Bonheur's Neuroscience Institute is internationally known for its expertise in epilepsy and pediatric brain surgery.
posts.address: 848 Adams Ave, Memphis, TN 38103, USA

posts.title: Erlanger Health System – Chattanooga
posts.content:
Erlanger Health System is the regional academic medical center for Southeast Tennessee and Northwest Georgia, serving as a Level I Trauma Center and safety-net hospital for the Chattanooga region. It is affiliated with the University of Tennessee College of Medicine Chattanooga.

Services include trauma surgery, cardiovascular care, oncology, neuroscience, orthopedics, and a Level III NICU. Erlanger is the only academic medical center in the region and provides advanced care that would otherwise require patients to travel to larger metropolitan areas.
posts.address: 975 E 3rd St, Chattanooga, TN 37403, USA

posts.title: University of Tennessee Medical Center – Knoxville
posts.content:
The University of Tennessee Medical Center in Knoxville is the only Level I Trauma Center in East Tennessee and a major academic medical center affiliated with the University of Tennessee Graduate School of Medicine. It is the region's most comprehensive tertiary and quaternary care hospital.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, cancer care, neurosurgery, orthopedics, high-risk obstetrics, and a comprehensive burn center. UT Medical Center also houses the region's busiest emergency department and serves as the medical home for patients throughout the East Tennessee mountains and beyond.
posts.companyName: The University of Tennessee Medical Center
posts.address: 1924 Alcoa Hwy, Knoxville, TN 37920, USA

posts.title: MedStar Georgetown University Hospital – Washington DC
posts.content:
MedStar Georgetown University Hospital is a nationally recognized academic medical center affiliated with Georgetown University School of Medicine, part of MedStar Health. Located in the heart of Washington DC, it provides world-class clinical care combined with cutting-edge research.

Georgetown is particularly known for its transplant center (one of the nation's largest), cancer care (Lombardi Comprehensive Cancer Center — the only NCI-designated cancer center in DC), neurology, and cardiovascular surgery. Its commitment to the Jesuit tradition of cura personalis (care of the whole person) guides its approach to patient care.
posts.address: 3800 Reservoir Rd NW, Washington, DC 20007, USA

posts.title: George Washington University Hospital – Washington DC
posts.content:
The George Washington University Hospital is a nationally recognized academic medical center affiliated with the George Washington University School of Medicine and Health Sciences. Located blocks from the White House, it is one of the most prominent hospitals in the nation's capital.

GW Hospital is a Level I Trauma Center and provides comprehensive specialty care including cardiovascular surgery, oncology, neuroscience, orthopedics, and women's health. It is also known historically as the hospital where President Ronald Reagan was treated after the 1981 assassination attempt.
posts.address: 900 23rd St NW, Washington, DC 20037, USA

posts.title: Children's National Hospital – Washington DC
posts.content:
Children's National Hospital in Washington DC is the region's only freestanding pediatric hospital and consistently ranked among the top children's hospitals in the United States. It is affiliated with George Washington University and serves as a teaching hospital for pediatric residencies and fellowships.

Specialties include pediatric cardiac surgery, oncology, neurology, neonatology, orthopedics, and rare diseases. Children's National has a long history of medical firsts in pediatric care and its research enterprise is one of the top-funded pediatric research programs in the country.
posts.address: 111 Michigan Ave NW, Washington, DC 20010, USA

posts.title: MedStar Washington Hospital Center – DC
posts.content:
MedStar Washington Hospital Center is the largest private hospital in Washington DC and a major academic medical center, part of MedStar Health. It is a Level I Trauma Center and provides comprehensive tertiary and quaternary care to patients from across the region.

Specialties include cardiovascular care (MedStar Heart & Vascular Institute), oncology, orthopedics, neuroscience, transplantation, and women's health. The hospital is the primary clinical training site for residents in multiple specialties and serves as the primary clinical partner for Howard University College of Medicine.
posts.address: 110 Irving St NW, Washington, DC 20010, USA

posts.title: Inova Fairfax Medical Campus – Falls Church
posts.content:
Inova Fairfax Medical Campus is the flagship hospital of Inova Health System, northern Virginia's largest not-for-profit health care system. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in the DC metro region and in Virginia.

Inova Fairfax is home to a Level I Trauma Center, a nationally recognized heart and vascular program, the Inova Schar Cancer Institute, advanced neonatology (one of the nation's largest NICUs), and comprehensive children's services (Inova Children's Hospital). It serves as the primary trauma referral center for the entire northern Virginia region.
posts.address: 3300 Gallows Rd, Falls Church, VA 22042, USA

posts.title: Sibley Memorial Hospital – Washington DC
posts.content:
Sibley Memorial Hospital is a 318-bed nonprofit community hospital in northwest Washington DC, part of Johns Hopkins Medicine. It provides comprehensive acute care services to residents of the District and neighboring Maryland and Virginia communities.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, women's health, and a full range of medical and surgical specialties. As a Johns Hopkins affiliate, Sibley gives patients access to subspecialty consultations and innovative care protocols developed at one of the world's leading medical institutions.
posts.address: 5255 Loughboro Rd NW NW, Washington, DC 20016, USA

posts.title: Howard University Hospital – Washington DC
posts.content:
Howard University Hospital is the teaching hospital for Howard University College of Medicine and a major safety-net hospital in Washington DC. It has played a critical role in training African American physicians and serving the predominantly African American communities of northeast DC for over 150 years.

Services include emergency medicine, Level I trauma care, surgery, obstetrics, internal medicine, psychiatry, and a range of specialty clinics. Howard University Hospital is committed to reducing health disparities and providing culturally competent care to underserved populations in the nation's capital.
posts.address: 2041 Georgia Ave NW, Washington, DC 20060, USA

posts.title: Virginia Hospital Center – Arlington
posts.content:
Virginia Hospital Center is a 342-bed acute care hospital in Arlington, Virginia, serving the northern Virginia and Washington DC metropolitan area. It is an independent, nonprofit community hospital consistently recognized for clinical quality and patient safety.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, women's health, emergency medicine, and a comprehensive stroke program. Virginia Hospital Center is a Leapfrog Grade A hospital and has earned multiple recognitions from U.S. News & World Report for regional hospital excellence.
posts.address: 1701 N George Mason Dr, Arlington, VA 22205, USA

posts.title: OHSU Hospital – Portland
posts.content:
OHSU Hospital is the flagship academic medical center of Oregon Health & Science University and the only academic medical center in Oregon. It is consistently ranked among the best hospitals in the Pacific Northwest and in the United States by U.S. News & World Report.

OHSU provides comprehensive specialty care with particular strengths in cancer (Knight Cancer Institute), cardiovascular surgery, neuroscience, organ transplantation, and women's health. Its research enterprise is among the largest in the Pacific Northwest, translating discoveries into new treatments for patients.
posts.address: 3181 SW Sam Jackson Park Rd, Portland, OR 97239, USA

posts.title: Providence Portland Medical Center
posts.content:
Providence Portland Medical Center is one of Oregon's leading acute care hospitals, part of Providence Health & Services — a major health system across the western United States. Located in the Boise neighborhood of northeast Portland, it provides comprehensive medical and surgical care.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer (Providence Cancer Institute), orthopedics, neuroscience, women's health, and emergency medicine. Providence Portland is consistently recognized for clinical quality and holds Magnet designation for nursing excellence.
posts.address: 4805 NE Glisan St, Portland, OR 97213, USA

posts.title: Legacy Emanuel Medical Center – Portland
posts.content:
Legacy Emanuel Medical Center is a major acute care hospital and Level I Trauma Center in north Portland, part of Legacy Health. It serves as one of the primary trauma centers for the Portland metropolitan area and provides comprehensive specialty care across dozens of clinical areas.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, neuroscience, burn care (Legacy Emanuel Burn Center — the region's only burn center), and emergency medicine. The hospital has been a cornerstone of the Portland medical community for over 125 years.
posts.address: 501 N Graham St, Portland, OR 97227, USA

posts.title: Adventist Health Portland
posts.content:
Adventist Health Portland is a faith-based acute care hospital serving southeast Portland and surrounding communities. Part of Adventist Health, it provides comprehensive medical care with a holistic approach that addresses patients' physical, emotional, and spiritual needs.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, women's health, behavioral health, and emergency medicine. Adventist Health Portland is known for its commitment to community health and its welcoming, compassionate environment for patients and families.
posts.address: 10123 SE Market St, Portland, OR 97216, USA

posts.title: PeaceHealth Sacred Heart Medical Center – Eugene
posts.content:
PeaceHealth Sacred Heart Medical Center is the major academic and tertiary care hospital for the Eugene-Springfield area and western Oregon. Part of PeaceHealth, it is affiliated with Oregon Health & Science University and provides comprehensive specialty care to patients from throughout the region.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, cancer care, neuroscience, orthopedics, Level II trauma care, and comprehensive women's health. Sacred Heart Medical Center is the largest hospital in the Eugene area and a major destination for complex cases from rural western Oregon.
posts.address: 3299 Hilyard St, Eugene, OR 97405, USA

posts.title: Salem Health Hospital – Salem
posts.content:
Salem Health Hospital is the primary acute care hospital for the Salem-Keizer metropolitan area and the mid-Willamette Valley, serving as a regional referral center for central Oregon. It provides comprehensive medical and surgical services to over 500,000 residents in its service area.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, neuroscience, Level II trauma care, and women's health. Salem Health is consistently recognized for quality and patient safety and serves as a major community health resource for Oregon's state capital region.
posts.address: 890 Oak St SE Bldg A, Salem, OR 97301, USA

posts.title: St. Charles Medical Center – Bend
posts.content:
St. Charles Medical Center in Bend is the flagship hospital of St. Charles Health System and the region's only Level II Trauma Center, serving central and eastern Oregon. It provides comprehensive acute care to one of Oregon's fastest-growing communities and to patients from across rural Oregon.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer, orthopedics, neuroscience, Level II trauma care, and a comprehensive women's health program. St. Charles is known for its outdoor recreation medicine program and its expertise in treating the injuries common among the active outdoor enthusiasts of central Oregon.
posts.address: 2500 NE Neff Rd, Bend, OR 97701, USA

posts.title: Legacy Good Samaritan Medical Center – Portland
posts.content:
Legacy Good Samaritan Medical Center is a comprehensive acute care hospital in northwest Portland, part of Legacy Health. Founded in 1875, it is one of the oldest hospitals in the Pacific Northwest and continues to serve Portland with expert specialty care.

Good Samaritan is particularly known for its orthopedic surgery program, cardiovascular care, neuroscience, and women's health. It houses one of the most active orthopedic surgery practices in Oregon and is a major clinical training site for Oregon's next generation of physicians.
posts.address: 1015 NW 22nd Ave, Portland, OR 97210, USA

posts.title: University Medical Center of Southern Nevada – Las Vegas
posts.content:
University Medical Center of Southern Nevada (UMC) is the only Level I Trauma Center in Nevada and a major public teaching hospital serving the Las Vegas metropolitan area. Affiliated with the Kirk Kerkorian School of Medicine at UNLV, it is the safety-net hospital for Clark County.

UMC provides comprehensive emergency and trauma care, burn treatment (Nevada's only burn center), cardiovascular surgery, transplantation, and a wide range of specialty services. It serves patients from across Nevada and neighboring states who require advanced trauma and specialty care not available elsewhere in the region.
posts.companyName: University Medical Center of Southern Nevada
posts.address: 1800 W Charleston Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89102, USA

posts.title: Cleveland Clinic Lou Ruvo Center – Las Vegas
posts.content:
Cleveland Clinic Lou Ruvo Center for Brain Health is one of the nation's leading centers for the prevention, treatment, and research of degenerative brain diseases, bringing Cleveland Clinic's world-class neurology expertise to Las Vegas. The building itself is an architectural landmark designed by Frank Gehry.

Services include diagnosis and treatment of Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, Huntington's disease, ALS, and other memory and movement disorders. The center is also a major site for clinical research into brain health, running numerous trials that offer patients access to the latest experimental therapies.
posts.companyName: Cleveland Clinic Lou Ruvo Center for Brain Health
posts.address: 888 W Bonneville Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89106, USA

posts.title: Sunrise Hospital and Medical Center – Las Vegas
posts.content:
Sunrise Hospital and Medical Center is one of Nevada's largest hospitals and a major regional referral center for the Las Vegas metropolitan area, part of HCA Healthcare. It provides comprehensive acute care and specialty services across dozens of clinical areas.

Services include cardiovascular surgery, cancer care, neuroscience, orthopedics, Level II trauma care, and a dedicated children's hospital (Sunrise Children's Hospital). Sunrise is consistently recognized for clinical quality and is home to several of Nevada's most active specialty programs.
posts.address: 3186 S Maryland Pkwy, Las Vegas, NV 89109, USA

posts.title: Valley Hospital Medical Center – Las Vegas
posts.content:
Valley Hospital Medical Center is a comprehensive acute care hospital in the heart of Las Vegas, part of Valley Health System. It provides a full range of medical and surgical services to residents and visitors in the Las Vegas area.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer treatment, orthopedics, women's health, emergency medicine, and a stroke program certified by The Joint Commission. Valley Hospital is known for its high patient satisfaction scores and its convenient access to specialist care in the growing Las Vegas metropolitan area.
posts.address: 620 Shadow Ln, Las Vegas, NV 89106, USA

posts.title: Renown Regional Medical Center – Reno
posts.content:
Renown Regional Medical Center is the flagship hospital of Renown Health, northern Nevada's largest health system, and the region's only Level II Trauma Center. It is the primary tertiary and quaternary care hospital for northern Nevada and northeastern California.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer (William N. Pennington Cancer Institute), neuroscience, orthopedics, transplantation, and women's health. Renown Regional is affiliated with the University of Nevada, Reno School of Medicine and serves as a major teaching hospital for the region's medical education programs.
posts.address: 1155 Mill St, Reno, NV 89502, USA

posts.title: Desert Springs Hospital Medical Center – Las Vegas
posts.content:
Desert Springs Hospital Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital in east Las Vegas, part of Valley Health System. It provides comprehensive medical and surgical care to the growing communities of the eastern Las Vegas valley.

Services include cardiovascular care, bariatric surgery, orthopedics, neuroscience, emergency medicine, and women's health. Desert Springs is recognized for its outstanding bariatric surgery program and its cardiac services, and has earned multiple quality recognitions from national health care organizations.
posts.address: 2075 E Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89119, USA

posts.title: Spring Valley Hospital Medical Center – Las Vegas
posts.content:
Spring Valley Hospital Medical Center is a comprehensive acute care hospital in southwest Las Vegas, part of Valley Health System. It serves the rapidly growing residential communities of the Spring Valley and Summerlin areas with convenient, high-quality medical care.

Services include emergency medicine, cardiovascular care, orthopedics, women's health, and a broad range of surgical services. Spring Valley Hospital has been recognized for its patient experience and clinical quality, and is particularly noted for its welcoming environment and attentive staff.
posts.address: 5400 S Rainbow Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89118, USA

posts.title: Summerlin Hospital Medical Center – Las Vegas
posts.content:
Summerlin Hospital Medical Center is a full-service acute care hospital in the upscale Summerlin community of Las Vegas, part of Valley Health System. It serves the western Las Vegas valley with comprehensive medical and surgical services in a modern, patient-friendly environment.

Services include cardiovascular care, cancer treatment, orthopedics, neuroscience, Level III NICU, women's health, and emergency medicine. Summerlin Hospital is consistently recognized for its excellent patient experience and clinical outcomes, holding multiple national quality designations.
posts.address: 657 N Town Center Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89144, USA
